metadata.title: Quanto costa studiare a Milano? | Collegiate Italy
metadata.heading_path: Quanto costa studiare a Milano? | Collegiate Italy

text:
## **Quanto costano le università a Milano**

Il costo delle università a Milano varia notevolmente a seconda che si tratti di istituzioni private o pubbliche. Mentre le università pubbliche offrono rette più accessibili, le università private, soprattutto quelle specializzate in settori come moda, design e finanza, possono avere costi più elevati.


### **Università private a Milano**

Le università private sono una delle opzioni più popolari per chi desidera studiare moda, design, finanza o medicina a Milano. Tra le istituzioni più rinomate troviamo l’Istituto Marangoni, che attira studenti da tutto il mondo per i suoi corsi in moda e design. Il costo medio di un anno accademico presso un’università privata come l’Istituto Marangoni può variare tra i 10.000 e i 20.000 euro.

Per chi è interessato alla finanza o all’economia, l’Università Cattolica offre percorsi di studi di altissimo livello, con rette che possono variare da 5.000 a 12.000 euro all’anno. In ambito medico, l’Università Vita-Salute San Raffaele è una delle scelte più prestigiose, con rette che possono arrivare fino a 20.000 euro all’anno.


### **Università pubbliche a Milano**

Le università pubbliche a Milano, come la Bicocca e il Politecnico di Milano, offrono una formazione eccellente a costi più contenuti. Le rette annuali per le università pubbliche variano solitamente in base al reddito familiare, con un costo medio che oscilla tra i 1.000 e i 3.000 euro all’anno. Queste università sono tra le più ambite, grazie alla qualità della formazione e alla vasta gamma di corsi disponibili.

metadata.title: Quanto costa studiare a Milano? | Collegiate Italy
metadata.heading_path: **Quanto costano le università a Milano**

text:
## **Il costo della vita a Milano**

Oltre alle tasse universitarie, un altro fattore importante da considerare è il costo della vita a Milano, che può essere piuttosto elevato rispetto ad altre città italiane. Vediamo nel dettaglio le principali spese che uno studente dovrà affrontare.


### **Costo di una residenza studentesca**

Il costo di un alloggio per studenti a Milano varia in base alla zona e al tipo di residenza. Le residenze studentesche “all-inclusive”, come quelle offerte da Collegiate, rappresentano una soluzione comoda e sicura per molti studenti. I prezzi di queste residenze possono variare dai 600 ai 1.200 euro al mese, a seconda dei servizi inclusi e della posizione. I pacchetti “all-inclusive” coprono spese come utenze, Wi-Fi, pulizie, e altri servizi, offrendo un servizio completo che semplifica la gestione del budget.


### **Spesa media mensile per il cibo**

Un altro aspetto da considerare è la spesa mensile per il cibo. Mangiare fuori a Milano può essere costoso, soprattutto nelle zone centrali, ma con una spesa attenta è possibile contenere i costi. Uno studente può aspettarsi di spendere in media tra 150 e 300 euro al mese per il cibo, a seconda delle proprie abitudini alimentari e della frequenza con cui si mangia fuori.


### **Prezzi dei trasporti pubblici**

Muoversi a Milano è relativamente semplice grazie a una rete di trasporti pubblici ben sviluppata, che include metropolitana, autobus e tram. Gli studenti possono usufruire di abbonamenti agevolati. L’abbonamento mensile per gli studenti costa circa 22 euro, offrendo accesso illimitato ai mezzi pubblici della città. In alternativa, un abbonamento annuale costa circa 200 euro, rendendo il trasporto pubblico una scelta conveniente.

metadata.title: Quanto costa studiare a Milano? | Collegiate Italy
metadata.heading_path: **Il costo della vita a Milano**

text:
## **Vita studentesca a Milano**

Studiare a Milano non significa solo frequentare lezioni e studiare, ma anche vivere un’esperienza unica in una città dinamica e ricca di cultura. La vita studentesca a Milano offre innumerevoli opportunità di svago, tra locali, eventi culturali e mostre. La città è conosciuta per i suoi numerosi bar e caffè dove gli studenti possono incontrarsi per studiare o socializzare. Inoltre, Milano ospita una serie di festival e concerti durante tutto l’anno, garantendo un ricco calendario di eventi per gli amanti della musica, dell’arte e dello spettacolo. Infine, la presenza di numerose università internazionali rende Milano un vero e proprio melting pot di culture, offrendo agli studenti l’opportunità di entrare in contatto con persone provenienti da tutto il mondo e ampliare così il proprio network personale e professionale.

Studiare a Milano comporta sicuramente delle spese, ma rappresenta anche un investimento per il futuro grazie all’eccellenza dei suoi istituti di istruzione e alle opportunità che la città offre. Se stai cercando una soluzione abitativa a Milano, le residenze [Collegiate](https://www.collegiate.it/) offrono un’opzione “all-inclusive” che permette di gestire meglio il budget, assicurando il massimo comfort durante il percorso di studi.

text:
## Informazioni utili

Tutte le informazioni che stavi cercando

Come posso attivare il servizio Amazon Prime incluso nell'offerta GIGA PRIME?

Accedi alla tua Area Personale dopo l'attivazione dell'offerta, se non lo hai già fatto imposta un metodo di pagamento automatico (carta o IBAN). Attiva Prime entro 12 mesi dall'attivazione dell'offerta: il servizio è incluso per un anno. Al termine dei primi 12 mesi, l'abbonamento si rinnova automaticamente a 4,99€/mese con addebito direttamente sul metodo di pagamento associato all'offerta.

Ho già un abbonamento Amazon Prime attivo. Posso attivare quello incluso nell’offerta GIGA PRIME?

Sì, ma prima è necessario disattivare l’abbonamento Amazon Prime attualmente attivo o attendere la sua scadenza. Questo, infatti, non può essere sospeso automaticamente e continuerà a essere addebitato finché rimane attivo. Una volta disattivato, potrai richiedere l’attivazione del servizio Amazon Prime incluso nell’offerta.

Ho già un'offerta mobile iliad, posso passare a GIGA PRIME?

Certo, accedi alla tua Area Personale per verificare le offerte disponibili ed eventuali costi per il cambio offerta.

text:
[Skip menu](https://www.italia.it/en/italy/practical-information/emergency-and-assistance#content)


When travelling abroad, knowing what numbers to call in an emergency can be of great help.

1 minute

Like


1/1

### **Emergency numbers in Italy**

If you find yourself in serious difficulty and need help, the single number to call for **emergencies in Italy is 112**. This is a free number to dial without any prefix: the operator will put you in touch with the most appropriate authority or service.

For needs limited to specific areas, you can call the following numbers:

- State Police: **113** (accidents, thefts, etc.).
- Fire brigade: **115** (fires, weather emergencies).
- Urgent and emergency medical attention: **118** (health-related needs). This number is also relevant for mountain or cave rescue.
- Roadside Assistance: at all hours of the day for motorists in emergency, assistance is provided by the [Automobile Club d’Italia](https://www.aci.it/laci/sicurezza-stradale/servizi-di-assistenza.html) (ACI), a federation of 106 provincial Automobile Clubs, which represents and protects the interests of Italian motoring. You can contact them on **803.116** or visit the official ACI website.
- Forest ranger: **1515**
- Travel information: **1518**
- Sea rescue: **1530**
- Veterinary assistance **(** [my vet of Poste Italiane](https://www.poste.it/files/1476505981568/Assistenzaveterinaria.pdf) **)**

Show more

Useful info

text:
## Choose your route and leave right away

Travel easily between Milan's airports and the city center with direct shuttle connections and frequent departures designed to match every flight. Book your ticket online in seconds and start your journey stress-free. Thanks to our collaboration with MilanoCard, you can also access additional benefits such as free urban transport in Milan for selected durations and discounts on attractions and services across the city.

[View schedules](https://www.malpensashuttle.it/en/contacts#services)

One Malpensa Shuttle ticket

Discounts on various attractions/services in Milan

On Monday the 7th I left my phone on the bus, I contacted the lost and found office this morning with little hope, but I can only say that the phone is here—they organized themselves really well and even brought it to Malpensa! Thanks to Vito, who delivered the phone to me at the bus stop, and thanks to everyone!

metadata.heading_path: Choose your route and leave right away

text:
We recommend booking the bus so that you arrive at the airport at least 4 hours before your flight. In most cases, your ticket can also be used on earlier or later trips on the same date, subject to service availability and free seats.

Where are the Malpensa Shuttle bus stops located?

The addresses of the stops and maps to find their exact location are available on the "Stops" page of our website.

What are the Malpensa Shuttle bus timetables?

All bus timetables are available on the "Stops" page of our website.

[Read all FAQs](https://www.malpensashuttle.it/en/faq)

Come sono collegati gli aeroporti di Malpensa e Linate a Milano? Vediamo tutte le alternative possibili per arrivare negli scali milanesi.

metadata.title: MALPENSA e LINATE: come si RAGGIUNGONO da Milano? - Milano Città Stato
metadata.heading_path: MALPENSA e LINATE: come si RAGGIUNGONO da Milano? - Milano Città Stato

text:
### \\# Treno e navette per arrivare all’aeroporto di Malpensa senza l’auto![](https://www.milanocittastato.it/wp-content/uploads/2022/02/credits-deliluna-ig-malpensa.jpg)

Credits deliluna IG – MalpensaCi sono circa **50 km** che separano il centro di **Milano dall’aeroporto di Malpensa**. La prima opzione da considerare è quella di arrivare allo scalo con **l’auto propria** o in **taxi percorrendo l’A8 o l’A4 e poi la statale 336**. In alternativa, se si vuole optare per il trasporto pubblico ci sono queste possibilità:

- **Malpensa Express**: il servizio aeroportuale di Trenord che unisce il centro di Milano all’Aeroporto di Malpensa, 7 giorni su 7 e che mette **in connessione diverse stazioni milanesi** (Bovisa, Cadorna, Porta Garibaldi, Milano Centrale) **con il Terminal 1** oppure con il **Terminal 2** dell’aeroporto. Dalla Stazione Centrale **parte un treno ogni ora**, il primo treno per il Terminal 2 alle ore 5:37 e l’ultimo alle 22:37, per il Terminal 1 rispettivamente alle 5:43 e alle 22:43;
- **Navette bus** in partenza **dalla Stazione centrale,** pullman di compagnie private che in circa **50 minuti** portano i passeggeri a Malpensa con fermate **sia al Terminal 1 che al Terminal 2**. All’aeroporto, per spostamenti tra i due terminal, sono invece disponibili navette gratuite con frequenza di 20 minuti dalle cinque del mattino fino a mezzanotte.

![](https://www.milanocittastato.it/wp-content/uploads/2022/02/centro-di-milano-malpensa-1024x657.jpg)Centro di Milano – Malpensa

Leggi anche: **[Da Malpensa la COMPAGNIA AEREA con SOLO posti in BUSINESS CLASS: aperte le prenotazioni](https://www.milanocittastato.it/featured/da-malpensa-la-compagnia-aerea-con-solo-posti-in-business-class-aperte-le-prenotazioni/)**

metadata.title: MALPENSA e LINATE: come si RAGGIUNGONO da Milano? - Milano Città Stato
metadata.heading_path: MALPENSA e LINATE: come si RAGGIUNGONO da Milano? - Milano Città Stato > \\# Treno e navette per arrivare all’aeroporto di Malpensa senza l’auto![](https://www.milanocittastato.it/wp-content/uploads/2022/02/credits-deliluna-ig-malpensa.jpg)

text:
### \\# Per Linate anche auto in sharing e linea bus 73. Entro la fine dell’anno la M4

![](https://www.milanocittastato.it/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/Milano-Linate-1024x683.jpg)Credits: Andrea Cherchi – Milano Linate

**Dal centro di Milano** al city airport di **Linate** sono circa **10 km**, una distanza sensibilmente più breve rispetto allo scalo di Malpensa. **In alternativa all’auto privata e al taxi, chi vuole arrivare in auto ha a disposizione il servizio in sharing di Enjoy, Ubeeqo e Sharenow.** Oltre a questo si può scegliere:

- la linea urbana di **autobus numero 73** del servizio ATM, con interscambio in centro alle fermate di Missori M3 e Duomo M1-M3, e operativa tutti i giorni dalle 05:23 alle 00:36.
- le **navette** in partenza **dalla Stazione Centrale, con cadenza oraria.**

![](https://www.milanocittastato.it/wp-content/uploads/2022/02/dateo-linate-m4.png)Dateo-Linate M4

**Entro la fine dell’anno** si aggiungerà **un’altra opzione:** la linea **metropolitana M4** che arriverà direttamente dentro lo scalo, **con prima fermata in città a Dateo FS**, stazione del passante ferroviario, e altre quattro prima del capolinea.

![](https://www.milanocittastato.it/wp-content/uploads/2022/02/centro-di-milano-linate.jpg)Centro di Milano – Linate

Leggi anche: **[M4: la nuova DATA d’inaugurazione e il “nuovo” PRIMO TRATTO](https://www.milanocittastato.it/featured/m4-la-nuova-data-dinaugurazione-e-il-nuovo-primo-tratto/)**

**Ti manderemo anche notizie che non pubblichiamo sui social.** Riservato agli iscritti della newsletter: inviti a eventi, incontri e feste organizzati o promossi da Milano Città Stato

_Il nostro sogno per l’Italia? Un’Italia federale, con forte autonomia per le aree urbane e i territori omogenei. Un Paese che premi il fare rispetto al non fare, con una forte propensione all’innovazione, che valorizzi le sue eccellenze distintive e che miri a essere sempre migliore, mettendo al centro il cittadino libero e responsabile verso la comunità._

text:
## Luxury Student Living, One Minute from Bocconi.

City centre location so you can easily access the wide variety of restaurants and bars. Close to universities too so a quick commute to lectures.

[![A spacious and beautifully designed room featuring a generous living area with a large sectional sofa, coffee table, and wall-mounted Smart TV with media unit and open shelving. The sleeping area includes a double bed with a statement green velvet headboard, wooden bedside tables, and elegant pendant lighting. Additional features include a dedicated workspace with desk and chair, a full-length mirror, fitted wardrobe, air conditioning, and warm wood flooring throughout. The room benefits from excellent natural light through large windows opening onto a private balcony with open city views. The shared bathroom is finished in striking dark terrazzo-effect tiles and features a rain shower with glass enclosure, a vessel sink on a floating oak vanity unit, round mirror, wall-mounted toilet, and bidet. A washing machine and dryer are also available. All guests also enjoy access to a shared kitchen and dining area.](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/9046f2_9f3363cbf4224a20adbb1ae3f5400e69~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_6,h_1024,al_c,q_85,enc_avif,quality_auto/Room%201.png)](https://www.sarfatti.eu/rooms-new/room-1)

text:
## OUR ROOMS

Experience comfort like never before

[Our Rooms](https://www.sarfatti.eu/rooms-new)

Lindy Lim

I recently stayed at this apartment while doing summer courses at Bocconi. Located just a short walk from the university, it was incredibly convenient, saving me so much time. The apartment itself was modern, spacious, and well-maintained, offering a comfortable living environment. The weekly cleaning service was a great bonus, the neighborhood was safe and the landlords were exceptionally kind and responsive. Overall, it was an ideal place to stay and I can highly recommend it!!

Rafaela Santos

My daughter went Bocconi Summer School and stayed at Sarfatti for two weeks. The room is spacious, comfort and clean, she felt safe and received a warm welcome from the staff and other guests. The wi-fi was very good and the shared bathroom was always clean. It was easy for her to cook small meals, walk around etc. The residence is really close to the University, what allowed her to go and come back anytime she wanted. I would definetely recommend the residence for other students that look for a good place while studying at the University.

Flavia Niţu

The apartment is really next to Bocconi, I don't think you can get a shorter campus walk than this. Everything in the apartment is new and modern, the weekly cleaning is a big bonus and the landlords are always easy to reach and open to help if there are any problems. Stayed here during my exchange semester and it was a good idea I definetly do not regret.

Tijana Pajic

I stayed at Sarfatti Residence during my exchange semester at Bocconi and it was the best experience! The location is perfect for students, just across the street from the library. The rooms are new and very nicely decorated. Moreover, the hosts were always available if my flatmates or me needed anything and very super helpful! I can highly recommend you this student dorm if you're looking for a place to stay as a Bocconi student. 10/10

Réka Szilágyi

Staying at Sarfatti Residence was truly an amazing experience during my exchange! The rooms are spacious, modern and cozy and right next to the Bocconi campus. Our hosts were also incredible and helped us with everything, even beyond housing-related issues, which I really appreciated as a foreigner.

Dan Cygler

Staying at Sarfatti Residence was an amazing experience. Located in front of Bocconi, it is an excellent choice for anyone staying in Milan. Additionally, the residence offers exceptional accommodations with modern and comfortable rooms that are thoughtfully designed.

Daria Franckenstein

10 out of 10! I had the best time here! The accommodation is right next to Bocconi, which is very convenient. There is a supermarket around the corner and public transportation is also close by. The apartment is very clean and renovated. You can rely on the landlords very well. Whenever there were problems, they took care of it.

Paula Hernandez vidal

Living at the Sarfatti Residence has been incredible. I have had a very good experience!!! Modern, clean facilities and charming hosts. Without a doubt, I would repeat.

Emanuele Longhi

I stayed for 6 days in June 2024 for an internship at Bocconi. Everything was above expectations, I recommend it.

text:
## Research, Rethink, Reimagine \| SDA Bocconi

> The trust placed in us by our students and their appreciation for our work drive us to devise programs and teaching methodologies able to develop skills and help young talents, experienced managers, companies and institutions be truly global.
>
> In welcoming you warmly, I would like to thank you for choosing us; I strongly believe that your time here will play an important part in your future success.

**Stefano Caselli**

Dean, SDA Bocconi School of Management


### International Student Care

Moving to a foreign country to study can be an unfamiliar and stressful experience, but we want to make the transition as smooth as possible and your time at SDA Bocconi enjoyable and worry-free.

With an ever-greater awareness of the importance of student wellbeing and engagement, SDA Bocconi makes its **Student Care Service** available to anyone enrolled in a master program.

We will continue to expand our services as we grow, to further provide everyone with the guidance they need to feel safe, protected and fulfilled during their time at SDA Bocconi.

Our purpose is to give you a positive experience: we are particularly aware of the challenges for international students and therefore offer guidance throughout all of the processes involved in studying at SDA Bocconi.

We provide services to help with a variety of bureaucratic and practical matters as well as help in the event of unexpected and difficult situations.

To accompany you throughout these steps, we strongly encourage you to consult our **Roadmap**, a comprehensive and easy-to-follow guide designed to help you navigate essential steps both before and upon your arrival. The roadmap outlines key procedures, such as visas, tax codes, health insurance, accommodation, and residency requirements and offers useful resources to help you settle into Milan and fully prepare for your journey at SDA Bocconi. Just read it carefully, as it contains valuable information that will help make your transition smoother and more informed.

[Consult our Roadmap](https://sda-website-prod-sdawebsiteprodbucketpublic693d05b-w3mwb4fo9x9p.s3.eu-south-1.amazonaws.com/s3fs-public/file/sda_bocconi_roadmap_for_incoming_students.pdf)


### Contact us

**Alice Dealessi** and **Valentina Grassi** will be your point of reference, helping you navigate all the challenges you might encounter.

Please don’t hesitate to **contact them for any questions or concerns**.

[studentcare@sdabocconi.it](mailto:studentcare@sdabocconi.it)

Our campuses

Milano

The most sustainable campus in the world

[Discover more](https://www.sdabocconi.it/en/who-we-are/campus-and-culture/milano/)

Roma

Immersed in history, with an eye to the future

[Discover more](https://www.sdabocconi.it/en/who-we-are/campus-and-culture/roma/)

Mumbai

A meeting point of international excellence

[Discover more](https://www.sdabocconi.it/en/who-we-are/campus-and-culture/mumbai/)

text:
L’assistenza sanitaria è garantita a tutti i cittadini (italiani e stranieri aventi diritto) attraverso una rete di servizi (assistenza medica e pediatrica, farmaceutica, specialistica ambulatoriale, ospedaliera, domiciliare e consultoriale) mediante l’iscrizione al Servizio Sanitario Regionale.

**L’iscrizione è obbligatoria e comporta la scelta del medico curante**.

Il cittadino, (o persona delegata) deve presentarsi presso gli uffici  “Scelta e Revoca” con il **codice fiscale, autocertificazione di residenza, eventuale tessera sanitaria dell’Azienda Sanitaria di competenza, documento di identità** dell’interessato (anche nel caso di persona delegata) o **delega**(in caso di persona delegata all’iscrizione).

Per i **nuovi nati** il genitore deve anche compilare un’autocertificazione attestante la nascita del figlio e la composizione della famiglia ed esibire il codice fiscale del neonato.

All’atto dell’iscrizione al Servizio Sanitario Regionale il cittadino effettua la scelta del medico curante, di norma tra i medici inseriti nell’ambito territoriale di appartenenza.

All’atto dell’iscrizione viene rilasciata una **tessera cartacea provvisoria** e successivamente, in genere entro un mese, viene recapitata all’indirizzo di residenza la Carta Regionale dei Servizi (una smart card elettronica), che sostituisce la tessera cartacea. Solo se l’iscrizione è inferiore a sei mesi non viene rilasciata tale Carta.

### Revoca e ricusazione del medico

Al cittadino è data facoltà di interrompere il rapporto con il curante e di scegliere  un altro medico per diversi motivi (es. trasferimento in altro comune, interruzione del rapporto di fiducia,  ecc…).

Anche al medico è data la possibilità, per giustificati motivi, di chiedere la revoca (ricusare) della scelta operata in suo favore. In questo caso l’ufficio “Scelta e revoca” invierà una comunicazione scritta all’assistito, con invito ad effettuare la scelta a favore di un altro medico.

### Scelta in deroga del medico

Per garantire la continuità di cura e del rapporto di fiducia, il cittadino che trasferisce la residenza in un altro comune può mantenere l’iscrizione al proprio medico di famiglia.

Il tal caso il cittadino deve compilare presso gli uffici “Scelta e revoca”  il modello di “Richiesta in deroga”, corredato da eventuale documentazione sanitaria pertinente e produrre la dichiarazione di **accettazione sottoscritta dal medico curante**, anche attestata mediante compilazione del riquadro riservato al medico all’interno del modulo “Richiesta in deroga”.

text:
## Iscrizione di cittadini italiani residenti all’estero

I cittadini italiani che hanno spostato  la residenza anagrafica all’estero ( AIRE- Anagrafe degli Italiani Residenti all’Estero ), anche se ivi domiciliati e con i **contributi attualmente versati in tale Paese, hanno diritto all’iscrizione gratuita al Servizio Sanitario Regionale, ma senza l’iscrizione col medico** e valida solo per **prestazioni ospedaliere urgenti**, per la durata massima di 90 giorni nell’anno solare, anche non consecutivi ( D.M. sanità-tesoro 1/2/96, circ. Min. San. 1000.V-19/833/630)

I documenti da presentare sono:

–           Documento di identità

–           Codice fiscale

–           Autocertificazione attestante la non copertura assicurativa pubblica o privata nel Paese estero di provenienza

–           Autocertificazione dello stato di emigrante

–           Autocertificazione di eventuale pensione erogata da Enti previdenziali italiani

–           Autocertificazione di eventuale frazione dei 90 giorni di assistenza già fruiti per richiesta ad altra ASST/ASL

I cittadini italiani che hanno spostato la residenza anagrafica all’Estero ( AIRE ), aventi attività lavorativa comportante invece **versamento dei contributi in Italia**, se temporaneamente domiciliati in Italia, possono iscriversi, con **scelta anche del medico**, per la durata massima dell’anno solare.

I documenti da presentare sono:

–           Documento di identità

–           Codice fiscale

–           Autocertificazione attestante la non copertura assicurativa pubblica o privata nel Paese estero di provenienza

–           Documentazione comprovante il versamento dei contributi in Italia

metadata.title: Iscrizione al servizio sanitario regionale e scelta del medico | Servizi Territoriali ASST Milano
metadata.heading_path: Iscrizione di cittadini italiani residenti all’estero

text:
## Mantenimento del pediatra oltre i 14 anni di età

Su richiesta del genitore e previa accettazione del medico, è possibile continuare ad avvalersi dell’assistenza del Pediatra anche oltre i 14 anni e comunque non oltre il 16° anno di età, nel caso l’assistito presenti:

–           patologia cronica o handicap

–           documentata situazione di disagio psico-sociale.

Il genitore deve presentarsi agli uffici “Scelta e revoca” con:

–           carta regionale dei servizi del figlio

–           richiesta di mantenimento della scelta del  Pediatra oltre i 14 anni corredata da documentazione  pertinente;

–           dichiarazione di accettazione sottoscritta dal Pediatra, anche attestata mediante compilazione del riquadro riservato al medico all’interno del modulo “Richiesta del mantenimento della scelta a favore del Pediatra per i cittadini con più di 14 anni”.

metadata.title: Iscrizione al servizio sanitario regionale e scelta del medico | Servizi Territoriali ASST Milano
metadata.heading_path: Mantenimento del pediatra oltre i 14 anni di età

text:
## Necessità occasionali di assistenza medica

Nel caso in cui il cittadino si trovi occasionalmente nel territorio di un’ATS diversa da quella di residenza, per un periodo inferiore ai 3 mesi o per un periodo superiore ma legato a motivi diversi da quelli sopra indicati, non è possibile procedere all’iscrizione al Servizio Sanitario Regionale nella ASST di temporanea dimora.

Per problematiche sanitarie non differibili, il cittadino può rivolgersi ad un medico o pediatra di famiglia che svolge la propria attività nel territorio, con pagamento della visita ambulatoriale o domiciliare. Presentando la ricevuta del pagamento della prestazione all’ATS di residenza, il cittadino ha diritto al rimborso della spesa sostenuta da parte della ATS di residenza.

Per necessità sanitarie urgenti il cittadino può rivolgersi al Pronto Soccorso di una delle Strutture ospedaliere del territorio.

### Costo massimo rimborsabile

–           Prestazione del Medico di famiglia: € 15,00 per visita ambulatoriale e € 25,00 per visita domiciliare;

–           Prestazione del Pediatra di famiglia: € 25,00 per la visita ambulatoriale e € 35,00 per la visita domiciliare.

_Si fa presente che non sono rimborsabili le visite effettuate presso la guardia medica, guardia turistica, pronto soccorso._

text:
## Smarrimento della carta regionale dei servizi

Per richiedere una nuova Carta Regionale dei Servizi è sufficiente presentare un’autocertificazione di furto/smarrimento agli uffici “Scelta e revoca” esibendo anche un documento di identità. Contestualmente viene rilasciata al cittadino una **tessera provvisoria cartacea.**

Successivamente, di solito entro un mese, la Carta Regionale dei Servizi viene recapitata all’indirizzo di residenza del cittadino, sostituendo quella cartacea provvisoria.

\\
Leggi tutto](https://www.serviziterritoriali-asstmilano.it/hai-ricevuto-una-tessera-sanitaria-senza-chip/ "Hai ricevuto una tessera sanitaria senza chip?")

Applying to Bocconi

[Overview](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi)

Bachelor and Law Programs

[Overview](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/bachelor-and-law-programs)


[VIA BLIGNY 22](https://www.google.it/maps/place/Residenza+Bligny/@45.4509665,9.1874869,17z/data=%213m1%214b1%214m5%213m4%211s0x4786c404dfbf427f:0xf157cc6b887a8008%218m2%213d45.4509628%214d9.1896756)

Inaugurated in September 2016, the **Bligny Residence** is located on campus.

The Residence has:

**A.** 4 single rooms with a private bathroom and shared kitchen;

**B.** 60 single rooms with a gender - specific bathroom shared with another student and shared kitchen;

**C.** 112 bedrooms in apartments with 4 single rooms, 3 bathrooms and a shared living room/kitchen area.

**Description of the spaces**

All rooms are furnished with a bed, a desk, a wardrobe and are equipped with WiFi internet. Blankets, sheets, pillowcases and towels are provided. Linens are changed and rooms are cleaned once a week. Guests in Bligny Residence may use shared kitchens located in each floor or the kitchen located in the common areas of the apartments. In addition, there are study rooms, break rooms, a coin laundry area and a relax area.

metadata.title: Bligny Residence | Bocconi University
metadata.heading_path: Bligny Residence | Bocconi University

text:
## Dorm amenities


### Wifi


### Laundry


### Study area


### Recreation area

Why live in University housing?

First of all, **location**: university residence halls are on or near campus, close to classes and the university facilities, and just minutes from the center of town.

Another important advantage of dorm life is constant **interaction** with your fellow students, Italian and international alike. You'll meet lots of different people with whom you'll have many things in common - interests, ambitions and dreams - in addition to your studies. It will be friendly environment where you'll soon feel at home.

Only students who are attending Bocconi University or participating in exchange programs are allowed to access the residence halls.

Plus, living in one of the university residence halls is both **safe and convenient**. All our residence halls have a doorman ready to help you 24/7, and the services included in your lodging fee will allow you to maintain your busy schedule without worrying about the electric bill or changing the sheets.

All Bocconi residence halls are closed during summer period, according to the period of suspension of courses and exams.

|
|

What the residents love about the Bligny Residence

- The Bligny Residence is located inside the campus;
- It is provided with large study rooms;
- It is located in a central area and well served by public transport.

How to book a room?

**Booking a room in a Bocconi residence is simple**: participate in one of the online applications planned for the 2026-27 academic year, at preferential or full rate. Please check the information available on our homepage at the following [link](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/bachelor-and-law-programs/housing "Housing").

### Campus VR

- [Take a Virtual Tour of the Residence](https://www.campusvr.unibocconi.it/en/Tour/Detail?id=2)

[Join Us at Our Open Day](https://bocconiopenday.liveforum.space/membership/login?lang=en-GB&source=float_login "Join Us at Our Open Day")

[More…](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/bachelor-and-law-programs/housing/bligny-residence#addtoany "Show all")

Plus, living in one of the university residence halls is both **safe and convenient**. All our residence halls have a doorman ready to help you 24/7, and the services included in your lodging fee will allow you to maintain your busy schedule without worrying about the electric bill or changing the sheets.

All Bocconi residence halls are closed during summer period, according to the period of suspension of courses and exams.

What the residents love about the Bocconi residence

- The Bocconi residence is the oldest one and in it you can breathe the past 60 years of Italian history and a strong sense of community;

- Students who live here consider this residence the beating heart of the University. Home away from home;

- It is located inside the campus;

- At the ground floor there is the university canteen;

- The next soccer field and the interior spaces for extracurricular activities.

How to book a room?

**Booking a room in a Bocconi residence is simple**: participate in one of the online applications planned for the 2026-27 academic year, at preferential or full rate. Please check the information available on our homepage at the following [link](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/bachelor-and-law-programs/housing "Housing").

### Campus VR

- [Take a Virtual Tour of the Residence](https://www.campusvr.unibocconi.it/EN/Tour/Detail?id=3)

text:
Applying to Bocconi

[Overview](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi)

Bachelor and Law Programs

[Overview](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/bachelor-and-law-programs)

Bocconi Residence Halls

_The content of this page applies exclusively to the 7 Bocconi Residence Halls. The partner facilities Aparto Giovenale and Olympic Village follow specific regulations and policies shared by their respective managers._

#### **Cancellation**

Housing assignments will be cancelled by the office for students who fall into the following cases and who have not applied for RENUNCIATION or WITHDRAWAL in the prescribed time and manner:

**Lack of the requirements to use the Housing Service (merit and academic year enrollment)**

The housing assignment will be cancelled to those who at any time during the year are found to lack one or more requirements to use the Housing service: merit requirement or enrollment requirement for the a.y. 2025-26. Such students will be required to vacate the accommodation immediately, will still be required to pay in full any housing installments already due and they will not be entitled to a refund if already paid. They will not be entitled to a refund of the security deposit.

**Withdraw from studies or transfer to another university**

The housing assignment will be cancelled to those who will matriculate/enroll in a.y. 2025-26 and who after matriculation/enrollment, at any time during the academic year, **transfer to another university or withdraw their studies**. Such students will be required to vacate the accommodation immediately, **will still be required to pay in full any housing installments already due** and they will not be entitled to a refund if already paid. They will not be entitled to a refund of the security deposit.

**Failure to comply with payment deadlines**

The housing assignment will be cancelled to those who fail to pay the housing installment after 15 days from the due date. Such students will be required to vacate the accommodation immediately, **will still be required to pay in full any housing installments already due** and they will not be entitled to a refund of installments already paid. The student will not be entitled to a refund of the security deposit. In this case, also the **suspension of the academic and administrative position of the student is applied** until he/she submits proof of completed payment regarding the amounts due. The university also reserves the right in this case to order the ineligibility of the student to use the Housing Service for the entire duration of the study cycle.

**Graduation**

The housing assignments will be cancelled for those who graduate during the year. Such students will have to leave their assigned housing permanently by the end of the same month of graduation. They will be due (or not refunded) in this case the exit month and the following month. The student will not be entitled to a refund of the security deposit.

**Missing economic requirement Right to university Education (for assignees at preferential rate)**

The housing assignment will be cancelled to those who are found to be assignees of preferential rate housing for a.y. 2025-26, but submit for the purpose of the Bocconi ISU Scholarship application a.y. 2025-26 an ISEE/ISEEU parificato whose values do not fall within the limits provided to benefit from preferential rate. Such students will be required to vacate the accommodation immediately, **will still be required to pay in full any housing installments already due** and they will not be entitled to a refund if already paid. They will not be entitled to a refund of the security deposit.

#### **Revocation**

The housing assignment will be revoked in the following cases:

**Disciplinary Procedures**

metadata.title: Cancellation and Revocation a.y. 2026-27 | Bocconi University
metadata.heading_path: Cancellation and Revocation a.y. 2026-27 | Bocconi University

text:
A student who receives a disciplinary sanction of exclusion from Università Bocconi during the year incurs **revocation of the housing assignment with consequent expulsion from the residence hall** and loss of the security deposit. In this case the student will have to permanently leave the housing assigned to him/her.

A student who receives a disciplinary sanction of suspension from exams and partial exams during the year will not incur revocation of the housing assignment, however, if he or she has an assignment at preferential rate, he or she will undergo the **change of rate from preferential to full rate**, and will therefore be required to pay the housing fee at the full rate starting from the first installment due after the sanction is communicated.

**Serious violation of the Bocconi Residence Regulations**

A student who during the course of the year incurs disciplinary sanctions in excess of a warning imposed by the university incurs **revocation of the housing assignment resulting in the expulsion from the residence hall** and loss of the security deposit. In this case, the student must permanently leave the housing assigned. The university reserves the right to refer the student to the Disciplinary Committee. The university also reserves the right in this case to order the ineligibility of the student to use the Housing Service for the entire duration of the study cycle.

**False declarations**

A student who submits/has submitted/ untrue statements incurs **revocation of the housing assignment resulting in expulsion from the residence hall** and loss of the security deposit. In this case, the student must immediately and permanently leave the housing assigned. The sanctions provided for in Articles 75 and 76 of Presidential Decree 445/2000 will also be applied, as well as the sanctions provided for in Article 10, paragraph 3 of Legislative Decree 68/2012 consisting in the loss of the right to obtain other disbursements for the entire duration of the course of studies, the payment of a sum three times the value of the services unduly used, without prejudice in any case to the application of the sanctions provided for in Article 38, paragraph 3, of Legislative Decree No. 78/2010 as well as the criminal provisions for facts constituting a crime.

Università Bocconi reserves the right to adopt disciplinary sanctions and, if the elements of a crime are found to exist (art. 331 c.p.p.), reporting to the judicial authorities.

Applying to Bocconi

Bachelor and Law Programs

[Overview](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/bachelor-and-law-programs)


VIA CASTIGLIONI

Inaugurated in 2018, the **Castiglioni Residence** is located on campus and has:

**A.** 200 single rooms in 4-bedroom apartments with 2 bathrooms and a shared living room/kitchen area;

**B.** 90 single rooms in 2-bedroom apartments with 1 bathroom and a living room/kitchen area;

**C.** 10 studio apartments with bedroom, bathroom and living room/kitchen area.

**Description of the spaces**

All rooms are furnished with a bed, a desk, a wardrobe and are equipped with WiFi internet. Blankets, sheets, pillowcases and towels are provided. Linens are changed and rooms are cleaned once a week. Kitchens are located in the common areas of the apartments. In addition, there are study rooms, break rooms, a coin laundry area and a relax area.

Why live in University housing?

First of all, **location**: university residence halls are on or near campus, close to classes and the university facilities, and just minutes from the center of town.

Another important advantage of dorm life is constant **interaction** with your fellow students, Italian and international alike. You'll meet lots of different people with whom you'll have many things in common - interests, ambitions and dreams - in addition to your studies. It will be friendly environment where you'll soon feel at home.

Only students who are attending Bocconi University or participating in exchange programs are allowed to access the residence halls.

Plus, living in one of the university residence halls is both **safe and convenient**. All our residence halls have a doorman ready to help you 24/7, and the services included in your lodging fee will allow you to maintain your busy schedule without worrying about the electric bill or changing the sheets.

All Bocconi residence halls are closed during summer period, according to the period of suspension of courses and exams.

text:
This housing application opportunity adds to the others foreseen for a.a. 2026-27:
- [Full rate Bocconi residence halls](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/bachelor-and-law-programs/housing/full-rate-ay-2026-27 "Full rate a.y. 2026-27") \- open to all Bocconi students
- [Preferential rate (ISEE/ISPE Regione Lombardia) Bocconi residence halls](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/bachelor-and-law-programs/housing/preferential-rate-ay-2026-27 "Preferential rate a.y. 2026-27") \- open to all Bocconi students
**Requirements**

The allocation of these accommodations will be **reserved for first-year students** (freshmen) enrolled in the first year of their degree programs (bachelor’s, law, and master’s) for the 2026–27 academic year.

If sufficient availability remains after the allocations dedicated to freshmen, students **enrolling in a year subsequent to the first** for the 2026–27 academic year will also have the opportunity to book accommodation in the Olympic Village. All updates will be published on this webpage.

**Room Type**
- Single room with private bathroom: € 986/month
The fee includes all services (utilities, internet, weekly cleaning with linen change, access to study/activity/relaxation areas, and 24-hour concierge service). Students have access to shared kitchens, located inside the building. At the time of the online application, students are required to pay a security deposit equal to two (2) months’ rent.

Payment of the rent is requested by the management in three installments, covering the following periods: September/November – December/March – April/July.

**Assigment period**

The assignment will be valid **from August 24, 2026 to July 23, 2027 (11 months)**. At present, automatic renewal of accommodation at the Olympic Village beyond the first year is not foreseen.

Students who have stayed in the Village during their first academic year will be **granted priority access** for the allocation of available places in other Bocconi Residences for their second academic year (with applications to be submitted approximately in March 2027).

**Application online**

Below is the list of available application sessions for the 2026-27 academic year.

**Warning!** Once a room has been reserved in any assignment session, whether for Bocconi residences or the Olympic Village, it is not possible to reserve another one. Those who confirm their reservation cannot later withdraw from it in order to participate in a subsequent session for Bocconi residence halls or the Olympic Village.

The link to the online application will be published on this page on the opening day of each session and will only be active starting from the specified opening time.

To log in, you must use the same credentials (userID and password) used for the enrollment procedure. Additional application windows may be added and published on this webpage at a later date.

Bocconi University performs solely a technical and administrative activity consisting of collecting applications and transmitting data to the Manager, and does not carry out any activity of intermediation, brokerage, agency, or representation, nor does it assume any obligations or liabilities towards students or the Provider.

Further details can be found in the online procedure and on the Useful Documents webpage.

If you are interested in Bocconi residence halls, you can take part in the applications outlined and indicated on the [dedicated page](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/bachelor-and-law-programs/housing/full-rate-housing-new-admission-application-ay-2026-27 "Full rate housing new admission application a.y. 2026-27").

metadata.heading_path: Dedicated to Freshmen | Bocconi University

text:
- **Tuesday, May 5 2026 at 3:00 PM (Italian time)**
**ONLINE APPLICATION**

In the session on May 5 at 3:00 PM, in addition to single rooms with private bathrooms, **beds in DOUBLE rooms** with internal bathrooms will also be available (€615/month).

Starting from the session on Tuesday, May 5, 2026, **also students of years subsequent to the first can apply for accommodation at the Olympic Village.**

Accommodation assignments at the Olympic Village are valid only for students whose academic program requires them to stay in Milan for the entire 2026–27 academic year.

**Previous sessions (expired)**
- Thursday, April 9, 2026, at 3:00 PM (Italian time) - expired
Instructions for submitting the application

The online application is intended exclusively for collecting applications for the allocation of beds at the Villaggio Olimpico University Residence, located within the real estate complex known as “Scalo di Porta Romana” (the “Residence”), managed by Villaggio Scalo Romana S.r.l. (the “Provider”), also through the appointed management entity, Campus X S.r.l. (the “Manager”). Bocconi University performs a purely administrative role in collecting applications and forwarding them to the Manager, remaining uninvolved in any contractual relationship concerning the Residence. Furthermore, the online application does not constitute an offer to the public nor a contractual proposal by Bocconi University, and the allocation of the room is subject to the conclusion of the Service Contract with the Provider.

Further details can be found in the online procedure and on the Useful Documents webpage.

Read the instructions carefully for completing the online application before submitting it.

**Step 1 - to secure the room**

\> ACCESS the link at the indicated opening time: you will enter a virtual “waiting room.” When it is your turn, log in using your Bocconi credentials (student ID/username and password).

\> COMPLETE THE SECTION “Accommodation choice”

If you do not see any options, it means that all available places have been filled.

\> CLICK ON “SAVE” at the bottom of the section

If you are unable to click it, it means that all available places have been filled.

\> CLICK ON “CONFIRM DATA / CONFERMA DATI”

If you are unable to click it, it means that all available places have been filled.

Your reservation is successful only if the red “Confirm data / Conferma dati” button is no longer visible and is replaced by the message: “You confirmed your data on dd/mm/yyyy.”

**Step 2 - to confirm the reservation**

steps to be completed by 11.59 pm on the same day

\> COMPLETE THE SECTIONS in which data are required

\> UPLOAD DOCUMENTS

Proceed to upload the following in the designated upload sections:
- security deposit
- signed contract
- any other required documents included in the application, duly signed

metadata.title: Dedicated to Freshmen | Bocconi University
metadata.heading_path: Dedicated to Freshmen | Bocconi University

text:
\> CLICK ON “INOLTRA DOMANDA/ SUBMIT APPLICATION”

Click “INOLTRA DOMANDA/ SUBMIT APPLICATION” by 11:59 PM on the same day.

Your reservation is successfully confirmed only if the red “Inoltra domanda / Submit application” button is no longer visible and is replaced by the message: “You submitted the application on dd/mm/yyyy.”

**Important**

If you were unable to click “Save” at the bottom of the section, it means that all available places have already been taken.

If you were able to select a room and save the section, but when clicking “Confirm data” another user took the last available place, the red “Confirm data” button will remain visible. This means that, even if you have selected and saved a room in the “Accommodation choice” section, your reservation was not successful due to lack of availability.

For this reason, you were unable to confirm your data and will need to participate in the next session.

text:
Applying to Bocconi

[Overview](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi)

Bachelor and Law Programs

[Overview](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/bachelor-and-law-programs)

Olympic Village and other opportunities

Kirsty Coventry - Chair of the International Olympic Committee

The spirit of the Olympic Games is about much more than just sport. I see this spirit most clearly at the Olympic Games, where athletes from every corner of our world compete with passion: yet they respect, support, and inspire one another.

In 2026, Bocconi University proudly takes up the legacy of the Milano-Cortina 2026 Winter Olympic Games by transforming the Olympic Village into a new home for its students.

Through this project, the campus expands and integrates even further with the city of Milan, and it’s ready to welcome hundreds of new students. **The new rooms available at the Olympic Village will be specifically** **reserved for freshmen** starting their journey at Bocconi in the 2026-27 academic year. This offer adds to the roughly 2,000 rooms already available in Bocconi Residences, further strengthening the housing experience provided by the University.

The Village was designed to leave a lasting legacy for both the city and the students beyond the Olympic event, becoming a new hub for university life in a prestigious Milanese neighborhood. Those who live there will become part of an already vibrant and international area, fueled by the presence of approximately 900 students hosted in the Isonzo, Dubini, and Spadolini Residences.

The architectural project, centered on the quality of student life, was developed to foster interaction, sharing, and a sense of community. The values expressed by athletes during the Olympic Games - commitment, respect, and dedication - find continuity in this symbolic location. It is destined to become the backdrop for a dynamic and inclusive international community, united by the same determination in both academic and personal pursuits.

The complex comprises six residential buildings and two pre-existing historic buildings, restored and enhanced to house functional and easily accessible services, including dining facilities, gyms, and shops. The project is completed by public spaces open to the inhabitants of the city and extensive green areas, designed to encourage integration with the neighborhood and social interaction.

**Freshmen: First Steps into the University World**

The agreement for the Olympic Village and the expansion of available rooms stems from a clear goal for Bocconi University: to make the relocation to Milan easier and worries-free for students and their families.

Searching for housing from a distance, handling contractual and administrative aspects, and organizing the relocation itself: relocation is often one of the most complex steps that students have to face before starting classes, especially considering their diverse backgrounds.

Arriving in the city can also create further challenges: the impact of a large metropolis and a completely new academic environment requires time, adaptation, and solid points of reference.

For this reason, **Bocconi University** **will welcome hundreds of freshmen at the Olympic Village,** offering a safe, organized environment designed to encourage social interaction and fully integrated into academic life.

Freshmen will have access to their rooms from the time of arrival (late August 2026) until the end of the first academic year (July 2027). This provides an entire year to settle in gradually, build relationships, get to know the city, and take the time to find the permanent housing solution that best suits their needs.

text:
For this application, all students must be regularly enrolled for a.y. 2025-26 for the first absolute time in the first year of a Bachelor program and not included in any of the [grounds for exclusion](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/bachelor-and-law-programs/housing/grounds-exclusion-full-rate-housing "Grounds for exclusion - full rate housing").

Check [this page](https://www.unibocconi.eu/housing) for details on our **7 residence halls, room types and prices**: you'll get to know our offer and will be able to choose your desired residence and room type very quickly once accessing the application, as there are limited options available for each type. The accommodation choice will work on a **first-come first-served** basis. Make sure you have your Bocconi credentials (username/student ID number and password) with you, use a fast internet connection and one device only. **Before applying, please read carefully the paragraph below: Instructions for submitting the application**

Instructions for submitting the application

Carefully read the instructions for filling out the online application before submitting it.

> ACCESS the link at the indicated opening time: you will be in a virtual "waiting room". When your turn comes, log in by entering your Bocconi credentials (student ID number/username and password).

> ENTER in the "Accommodation choice" section.

> SELECT THE RESIDENCE

If you do not see any options, it means that there are no longer available places.

\> SELECT ROOM TYPE

If you do not see any options, it means that there are no longer available places.

> CLICK ON "SAVE" at the bottom of the section.

If you can't click it means that there are no longer available places.

> CLICK ON "CONFIRM DATA / SUBMIT DATA"

If you are unable to click it means that there are no longer available places.

> The reservation was successful only if the red "Confirm data/Submit data" button is no longer visible and in its place appears the words, "You confirmed the data on dd/mm/yyyy."

> UPLOAD DOCUMENTS AND SUBMIT APPLICATION

Proceed by 11:59 p.m. on the same day to upload all documents available in application to be printed, hand signed and uploaded in the upload spaces provided, and to pay the security deposit. Click on "Submit application/ Submit application" by 11:59 p.m.

The office will verify that your reservation was successful and it will give it a result through MyApplication in the following days.

**ATTENTION**

If you were not able to click on "Save" at the bottom of the section, it means that there are no longer available places. Proceed to select a new room type and/or Residence.

If you have succeeded in selecting a Residence and room type and saved the section, but at the time of "Submit data" another student has taken the last available place for the Residence and/or type you selected, the red "Submit data" button remains visible: this means that, even if you have already expressed and saved a preference in the "Residence and room type" section, your reservation was not successful due to lack of availability.

Because of this, you were not able to confirm the data, so you will have to:

-re-enter the "Residence and Room Type" section;

-select a new option;

-save the data on the section again by clicking on "SAVE";

-confirm the data for the new selection by clicking on the red "Submit data" button.

If in searching for a new option to select all available places are taken, the system would continue to show you, in the "Residence and Room Type" section, your original selection: this does NOT mean that the reservation was successful.

Acceptance and next steps

**Acceptance**

metadata.title: Dedicated reservations a.y. 2025-26 | Bocconi University
metadata.heading_path: Dedicated reservations a.y. 2025-26 | Bocconi University

text:
The Office will receive your complete application, verify the coherence of your residence/room choice with the effective room availability and all the other aspects of your position (i.e. if you meet the requirements needed for the application). The process usually takes approximately 1 working week. After that, **the Result of your housing application will be published on My Application**: you will find in it confirmation of your assigned room, of the period and price applied and all the **instructions to complete the acceptance (final step).**

You will need to print, **sign and upload the Acceptance document** that you will see in the application, in order to confirm your room assignment for a.y. 2025-26 and to acknowledge again the conditions applied. Failure to complete the Acceptance within the established deadline will result in the cancellation of your room reservation.

**Next steps**

_Documents to attest your stay in one of the Bocconi residence halls_

During the whole academic year, the Result of your housing application will be visible on MyApplication: you can print it or download it in .pdf in case you'll need to attest your stay in one of our residence halls; in fact, the result contains all the information usually needed for the purpose (name and address of the assigned residence hall, period of assignment, price of the accommodation).

_Room change_

For the entire period in which the student is a resident at a Bocconi residence hall, room changes are not allowed. Bocconi University, however, is entitled to transfer the resident, even during the year, to another housing facility at the rate due for the residence hall of destination.

_Renewal of housing assignment_

The housing assignment for the 2025-2026 a.y. is granted for the academic year in which the application is submitted, therefore it will not be automatically granted for the following academic years but it is the student's responsibility to verify the possibility to submit a housing renewal application and to apply according to the procedure and deadline that will be provided for in the Housing Application Requirements and Regulations for each academic year of interest.

Applying to Bocconi

[Overview](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi)

Bachelor and Law Programs

[Overview](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/bachelor-and-law-programs)


[VIA VITTORE BUZZI 7](https://www.google.it/maps/place/Residenza+Dubini,+Via+Vittore+Buzzi,+7,+20141+Milano+MI/@45.4420054,9.1950993,18z/data=%213m1%214b1%214m5%213m4%211s0x4786c4144749107b:0x648b73883067ca48%218m2%213d45.4418027%214d9.1959377)

Located just a 10-minute walk from campus, the **Dubini Residence** has:

**A.** 176 single rooms in 4-bedroom apartments with 2 bathrooms and a shared living room/kitchen area;

**B.** 140 single rooms in 2-bedroom apartments with 1 bathroom and a living room/kitchen area;

**C.** 10 studio apartments with a bedroom, bathroom and a living room/kitchen area.

**Description of the spaces**

All rooms are furnished with a bed, a desk, a wardrobe and are equipped with WiFi internet. Blankets, sheets, pillowcases and towels are provided. Linens are changed and rooms are cleaned once a week. Kitchens are located in the common areas of the 2/4-bedroom apartments or in the studio apartments. In addition, there are study rooms, break rooms, a coin laundry area and a relax area.

metadata.title: Dubini Residence | Bocconi University
metadata.heading_path: Dubini Residence | Bocconi University

text:
## Dorm amenities


### Wifi


### Laundry


### Study area


### Recreation area

Why live in University housing?

First of all, **location**: university residence halls are on or near campus, close to classes and the university facilities, and just minutes from the center of town.

Another important advantage of dorm life is constant **interaction** with your fellow students, Italian and international alike. You'll meet lots of different people with whom you'll have many things in common - interests, ambitions and dreams - in addition to your studies. It will be friendly environment where you'll soon feel at home.

Only students who are attending Bocconi University or participating in exchange programs are allowed to access the residence halls.

Plus, living in one of the university residence halls is both **safe and convenient**. All our residence halls have a doorman ready to help you 24/7, and the services included in your lodging fee will allow you to maintain your busy schedule without worrying about the electric bill or changing the sheets.

All Bocconi residence halls are closed during summer period, according to the period of suspension of courses and exams.

What the residents love about the Dubini Residence

- The Dubini Residence is located 10-minute walk from the campus;
- The area is well served with pharmacies, supermarkets and shops; it is also close to public transport to reach the city center;
- It is located close to green areas and parks.

How to book a room?

**Booking a room in a Bocconi residence is simple**: participate in one of the online applications planned for the 2026-27 academic year, at preferential or full rate. Please check the information available on our homepage at the following [link](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/bachelor-and-law-programs/housing "Housing").

text:
Applying to Bocconi

[Overview](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi)

Bachelor and Law Programs

[Overview](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/bachelor-and-law-programs)

In order to apply for one of the a.y. 2025-26 Right to University Education benefits (ISU Bocconi Scholarship, preferential rate housing, preferential rate canteen service), students who meet **all the requirements set for each application** will also need to meet **economic requirements** defined at regional level. In order to attest their economic eligibility, applicants will be required to submit all the [**necessary documentation**.](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/current-students/funding/necessary-documentation-isu-bocconi-scholarship-ay-2025-26 "Necessary documentation - ISU Bocconi Scholarship a.y. 2025-26")

**Economic Requirements**

The ISEE/ISEEU parificato and ISPE/ISPEU parificato values are defined annually by the Lombardy Region with its own resolution.

For a.y. 2025-26, the values set by the Lombardy Region have been the following:

>\> ISEE/ISEEU parificato no higher than € 26.516,70

>> ISPE/ISPEU parificato no higher than € 57.645,03

In order to apply for a benefit of the Right to University Education students whose family household resides and has sources of income **in Italy** will need to obtain an "Attestazione ISEE per prestazioni agevolate per il diritto allo studio universitario"issued in2025 whose "ISEE" and "ISPE" values fall within the limits provided. Otherwise, the application cannot be accepted.

Students whose family household resides and has sources of income **outside of Italy** must obtain the **ISEEU Parificato Certificate** issued in 2025,whose "ISEEU" and "ISPEU" values fall within the limits provided.This document can only be issued by the CAF partnered with Bocconi University.

It is specified that the **ISPE/ISPEU parificato** value is calculated by the University by dividing the ISP/ISPU parificato value by the equivalence scale.

**It is specified that, for all applicants, all declarations attesting an annual income lower than 6.542,51 euros for fiscal year 2023 will not be considered valid for the purpose of housing assignment.**

**Economic requirements for INDEPENDENT STUDENTS**

metadata.title: Economic requirements for the submission of housing application a.y. 2025-26 | Bocconi University
metadata.heading_path: Economic requirements for the submission of housing application a.y. 2025-26 | Bocconi University

text:
For the purpose of adequately accounting for individuals who bear the burden of the student's support, the student is considered independent only if, in addition to the economic requirements described above, **both** of the following requirements are met:

- **Residence**, as proven by registry data, outside the housing unit of the family of origin for at least two years before the date of the ISEEU parificato certificate, in an accommodation that is not owned or in usufruct by one of its members and therefore he/she uses an accommodation upon payment that must be documented;
- **Income** from employment or similar work, declared for tax purposes for at least the past two years, not less than €9,000.00annually. The work may not be performed under the employment of a family member within the third degree of kinship.

If **both** the above conditions are NOT met – and duly documented – the student is considered part of the parents’ family unit, and therefore his/her economic and asset condition as well as that of his/her family of origin will be considered when determining eligibility for Right to University Education assistance and the ISU Bocconi bracket.

The additional documentation required to independent students is listed on the " **Necessary documentation**" webpage.

**Attention:**

The family unit (Family household composition) is defined pursuant to the Decree of the President of the Council of Ministers 5 December 2013, n. 159.

text:
Applying to Bocconi

[Overview](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi)

Bachelor and Law Programs

[Overview](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/bachelor-and-law-programs)

Bocconi Residence Halls

_The content of this page refers exclusively to the 7 Bocconi Residence Halls. For fees, installments, and deadlines related to the Olympic Village, please refer to the dedicated page (Dedicated to Freshmen)._

**General information**

By accepting the housing assignment, the student **commits to paying the housing fee for the entire agreed period and the security deposit**, which will only be returned at the end of the agreed period. The housing rates in Bocconi university residences vary according to the type of residence and accommodation and are divided into “ **full rate**” and “ **preferential rate**”.

The preferential rate of the accommodation service is applied to students who meet the requirements defined by the Right to University Education, based on the economic condition of the applicant's family evaluated on the basis of the value of the ISEE/ISSEU parificato indicator for services for the Right to University Education and the ISPE/ISPEU parificato value.

Students who meet the economic requirements (ISEE/ISEEU parificato and ISPE/ISPEU parificato parameters) foreseen for a.y. 2026-27 may request the assignment of a room at preferential rate. For the preferential rate, 3 different fee levels based on the ISU brackets (1st, 2nd and 3rd ISU bracket) are foreseen, depending on the values indicated on the ISEE/ISEEU Parificato Certificate submitted at the moment of the application. For all other students the full rate is applied.

The students contemporary enrolled or who intend to contemporary enroll for a.y. 2026-27 also to another bachelor of science, master of science, integrated master of arts, AFAM (Institution of Higher Education for Fine Arts, Music and Dance) course of 1° or 2° degree of study, pursuant to Italian Law n. 33/2022, at a different Italian or foreign University or AFAM, who submit or have submitted the application for the benefit connected with the Right to University Education Assistance at the other University or AFAM, cannot benefit of the preferential rate housing assignment. These students will be able to submit the application only for full rate housing.

The students assigned with a preferential rate accommodation for whom the contemporary enrollment with the request of the benefit connected with the Right to University Education Assistance at the other University or AFAM is verified, will be requested to pay full rate. The new fee will be applied from the first installment.

The standard assignment period goes **from 20 of August 2026 to 27 of June 2027** **(10 months)**  and meets the academic needs of most students. The assignment for the month of July 2027 can be specifically requested and paid separately by those who need it. A special application to request the assignment for the month of July 2027 will be available: please check all the information on the [dedicated webpage.](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/bachelor-and-law-programs/housing/july-2027 "July 2027")

Housing rates may change according to the rate of inflation and any updates.

metadata.title: Fees, deadlines and methods of payment a.y. 2026-27 | Bocconi University
metadata.heading_path: Fees, deadlines and methods of payment a.y. 2026-27 | Bocconi University

text:
The fees published here refer exclusively to the academic year 2026-27, for which they will apply. For subsequent academic years, housing fees may be subject to change according to the inflation rate and any updates.

- **1st installment** (covering the period September-December 2026) by **July 30, 2026 - tbc**
- **2nd installment** (covering the period January-March 2027) by **December 19, 2026 - tbc**
- **3rd installment** (covering the period April-June 2027) by **March 10, 2027 - tbc**

Exceptions are open reservations for periods shorter than one year, which require payments with specific deadlines communicated at the time of assignment.

**Important note - first installment for accommodation**

Please note that the option to view the payment due for the first installment for accommodation will be available to all students who are assigned accommodation at the beginning of July 2026, regardless of their status in terms of meeting the merit or enrollment requirements. In fact, viewing the payment due in the you@B calendar does not equate to an unconditional assignment of accommodation, which remains subject to enrollment and merit requirements, verified by the Office after the payment deadline (July 30, 2026). Please note that **if the requirements for accommodation are not met, the assignment will be automatically canceled and the payments due will remain the responsibility of the student; the amount due cannot be canceled.**

metadata.title: Fees, deadlines and methods of payment a.y. 2026-27 | Bocconi University
metadata.heading_path: Fees, deadlines and methods of payment a.y. 2026-27 | Bocconi University

text:
### Housing fees a.y. 2026-27

- [Housing+fees+2026-27.pdf](https://www.unibocconi.it/sites/default/files/Housing%2Bfees%2B2026-27.pdf)

**Tuition fees are paid via PagoPA** by clicking on the “payment code” and then on “Pay with PagoPA.” The transaction is completed online (credit card, bank account, PayPal, etc.) and is registered in a few minutes: the sticker changes from red to green.

**Alternatively, you can print the MAV and pay via ScrignoPagoFacile** ( [www.scrignopagofacile.it](http://www.scrignopagofacile.it/)) or home banking. In this case, registration takes 3-5 working days.

**For non-SEPA payments (currencies other than the euro), the Flywire system is also available**, which can be selected in the Punto Blu. Registration takes approximately 5 working days.

To avoid penalties, we recommend paying in advance of the due date. A complete guide is available on B in touch.

Accommodation fees are published a few weeks before the deadline (immediately after confirmation of availability in the case of open reservations). The first accommodation installment will be available:

- after enrollment for the 2026-27 academic year (by July 31) for students already enrolled.
- approximately from mid-July for newly enrolled students.

Important: the tuition fee calculation process automatically sends users an electronic invoice containing an IBAN that must not be used to make the payment. **Payments made in a manner other than that specified will cause interruptions and delays in the normal payment registration process**.

If the payment is not made nor registered in agenda **within 15 days** from the deadline, the student will incur: :

• the **cancellation of the housing assignment** is applied with immediate expulsion from his/her assigned accommodation;

• the **suspension of the academic and administrative position** of the student is applied until proof of completed payment regarding the amounts due is submitted.

The student will in any case and still be subject to the payment in full of all pending amounts and will not have the right to the refund of amounts already paid. In addition, the deposit will not be refunded.

The Fees, Funding and Housing Office, in addition, reserves the right to determine the non eligibility of the student for the Housing Service for the whole study cycle.

**ATTENTION**

A student who receives a disciplinary sanction of suspension from exams and partial exams during the year will not incur revocation of the housing assignment, however, if they have an assignment at preferential rate, they will undergo the **change of rate from preferential to full rate**, and will therefore be required to pay the housing fee at the full rate starting from the first installment due after the sanction is communicated.
