text:
The **bathroom** will be as follows, depending on the type of room:
- single room with private bathroom: private for exclusive use
- studio apartment: private for exclusive use
- single room with shared bathroom: shared with only one student of the same gender
- single room in a 2-bedroom apartment: shared with only one student of the same gender
- single room in a 4-bedroom apartment: shared with only one student of the same gender
As for the **kitchen**, here is how it is provided for each type of room:
- single room with private bathroom: has access to a shared kitchen located on the same floor, which serves approximately 15-20 students
- single room with shared bathroom: has access to a shared kitchen located on the same floor, which serves approximately 15-20 students
- Studio apartment: has a private kitchenette located inside the apartment.
- Single room in a 2-bedroom apartment: has a private kitchen, which is shared only with another bedroom. In this case, the room is shared with a student of the same gender.
- Single room in a 4-bedroom apartment: has a private kitchen, which is shared only with 3 other bedrooms. Please note that in this case, sharing may be between 4 students of the same gender, but also between students of the opposite gender: it is possible that 4-room apartments may be assigned to 2 males and 2 females.
When living in residence, you will always have access to a kitchen where you can prepare your meals: it may be inside your apartment or shared on your floor, depending on the type of accommodation you have booked.

All kitchens in Bocconi residences are equipped with cooking stoves, so you can only use pots and pans marked with the relevant symbol. Plates, glasses, and other kitchenware are not provided: you can decide to bring them from home before you arrive, although we suggest you wait until you arrive at the residence so that you can organize sharing the purchase or use of these items with your roommates. Near the residences, you will find supermarkets and other well-stocked stores where you can buy everything you need, either for yourself or to share.

To ensure a positive experience for everyone, it is essential that all guests cooperate in **leaving the kitchen tidy and clean after each use**: tidying and cleaning must be carried out by each guest after preparing their meal. The cleaning service included in the fee certainly covers the kitchens, but the staff will not be able to complete it properly if the kitchens are found cluttered with dirty dishes and pots.

All residences have common areas where you can spend your free time, focus on your studies, or relax with your friends. In particular, you will find:
- study room: dedicated to individual or group study and reserved for residence guests,
- games room: a recreation area designed in collaboration with student representatives for socializing with other residence guests,
- relaxation room: where you can do bodyweight exercises or relax after a long day of studying.

metadata.title: Life in the Bocconi dorms | Bocconi University
metadata.heading_path: Life in the Bocconi dorms | Bocconi University

text:
All Bocconi Residences and campus buildings are equipped with drinking water dispensers. Check [this page](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/about-us/sustainability/drink-sustainably "Drink Sustainably!") to see where they are located and commit to reducing plastic consumption. In addition, in the break areas of the residences, you will find vending machines selling sweet and savory snacks, coffee machines, and even vending machines selling personal care products.

All residences have a laundry area with automatic washing machines and dryers. Each wash and dry cycle is subject to a fee, based on the rates displayed in the laundry rooms of each residence. Ironing boards and irons are not provided.

All Bocconi Residences offer a 24-hour reception desk service. After checking in and settling into your accommodation, you can also receive mail at the reception.

The common areas of the apartments, bathrooms, and bedrooms are cleaned once a week. The cleaning service for the common areas of the Residence is daily. As a rule, rooms and apartments are cleaned by floor: upon arrival, check which day your accommodation will be cleaned. In particular, the following services are provided: cleaning of bathrooms, cleaning of the kitchen and living area, change of linen (sheets and towels), and bed making. You will be provided with: a blanket, sheets, and face towels. If you prefer, you can bring your own linens, which you will need to wash/change yourself. Please note that staff will only clean the accommodation if it is tidy.

If you require technical maintenance in your accommodation, you must submit a request via the dedicated portal by scanning the QR codes located in each room. Submitting the request will allow the residence management to intervene promptly to resolve the problem you have encountered, replacing any defective parts or carrying out all necessary checks with the relevant technicians. Please note that the residence management and Bocconi University staff will be able to access your accommodation even in your absence in case of necessity or urgency.

All utilities (electricity, heating/air conditioning, water) are included in the accommodation fee, as is WiFi connection, which is guaranteed in all common areas and rooms. Please refer to Article 16 of the Residence Regulations and the Addendum for some important notes on the use of the connection.

Bocconi University is committed to ensuring the health and safety of all its students, both on campus and in its residences, in order to prevent accidents and minimize all risks associated with university life.

In order to live in the residences, it is essential to be aware of the potential risks that may arise from the improper use of the facilities and equipment provided in the building or owned by guests. The cooperation of all guests is essential to prevent dangers arising from improper behavior (inappropriate use of kitchens, use of electrical appliances or tools that are not provided and are potentially dangerous, smoking outside of designated areas).

When it comes to safety in the residence, there are many topics to address, such as:
- Fire risk
- Evacuation rules
- Accidents in the apartment
- What to do in case of accident/illness
- What to do in case of flooding
Check all the safety rules and regulations in the residence and if you have any doubts, contact the manager.

Bocconi has set up a medical center on campus, a medical clinic on the first floor of the building at Piazza Sraffa 11. The medical center will primarily serve the needs of non-residents of Milan and those who have difficulty accessing their own primary care physician, with the following important notes:

metadata.title: Life in the Bocconi dorms | Bocconi University
metadata.heading_path: Life in the Bocconi dorms | Bocconi University

text:
- The medical center is NOT an emergency service; in case of emergency, always call the European emergency number 112 or the Bocconi emergency number +39 0258362121, which will activate the ambulance service if necessary.
- This is a first-level internal medicine service that can provide medical examinations with reports, medication, and prescriptions (however, it CANNOT issue prescriptions covered by the National Health Service, as by law this can only be done by your family doctor).
- This service is only available to members of the Bocconi community and cannot be extended to others (family members and acquaintances).
Schedules, procedures, and contact information are available in the yoU@B Agenda in the Health and Safety widget and on the Intranet. For further information, please contact [hse@unibocconi.it](mailto:hse@unibocconi.it).

**Live your residence in GREEN mode**

We care about respecting the environment: less waste, more attention to consumption, and proper waste management. It's up to you to do your part too!

♻️ **Separate waste collection**

In your room, apartment, and common areas, remember to separate your waste:
- Organic → brown
- Paper/cardboard → white
- Glass → green
- Plastic/metal → yellow
- Non-recyclable → black
If you have any doubts, take a look at the **AMSA** website: it will only take you 2 minutes.

👉 NB: PCs, smartphones, and small appliances do NOT go in unsorted waste: take them to collection points (recycling centers or CAM).

🚫 **Less plastic and paper**
- Use the water fountain in the Residence instead of plastic bottles.
- Only print if really necessary.
- Choose recycled materials.
⚡ **Be mindful of consumption**
- Turn off lights when not in use.
- Do not leave windows open with the heating/AC on.
- Do not waste water.
🏠 **Respect the spaces (they are your home!)**
- Dispose of waste in the correct bins.
- Clean and tidy up after using the common areas.
- Do not throw food in the sink.
- Keep your room tidy.
- Do not damage furniture or rooms: other students will be here after you!
❗ **Important**

If the accommodation is found to be in **poor condition**, the management may:
- Charge you for **extra cleaning**;
- Give you an **official warning**;
- In serious cases → **expulsion** from the Residence, loss of deposit, and referral to the Disciplinary Committee.

text:
The temperature control system in university residences is set in accordance with municipal ordinances governing the correct temperatures to be maintained in buildings, as well as the maximum number of hours allowed for the operation of the systems, with the aim of reducing energy consumption and limiting environmental impact.

The system operates according to a technical protocol implemented in 2017, which regulates the activation of air conditioning systems using standardized parameters, in particular:

for heating, a set point of 19 degrees Celsius is set, which is the temperature indicated as compliant by the Municipality of Milan, with a margin of tolerance of 1-2 degrees.

The activation of air conditioning depends on the outside temperature, which must reach at least 26 degrees Celsius and ONLY if the window is closed (when the window is open, the system switches off automatically).

The system operates during specific time slots, which are shared with guests by the manager of each residence and updated seasonally.

Any malfunction of the systems must be reported promptly using the dedicated QR code: in this way, technicians will immediately check for any faults or the need to replace spare parts in the individual appliances in the rooms (fan coils), or they will be able to carry out all the necessary checks in the event of centralized problems.

The perception of heat/cold is entirely personal, but the settings applied are certainly suitable to ensure everyone's thermal comfort. Bocconi is confident that it can count on the sensitivity of all members of its community to protect environmental sustainability.

Bocconi University has accommodation in each residence designed to accommodate students with disabilities, offering them the opportunity to enjoy their university experience in a communal setting that meets their needs. Students with disabilities who have special accommodation requirements can contact the Fees, Funding and Housing Office, which will work with each student to assess the most suitable accommodation for their specific needs. All issues reported and documentation provided will be treated confidentially and subject to current privacy regulations. In order for the Office to be able to meet the requests received, it is advisable to specify the needs in advance. Interested students are therefore advised to contact the Fees, Funding and Housing Office before submitting their accommodation application.

text:
Housing

[Overview](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/current-students/housing)

Bocconi University is committed to welcoming you into an environment designed to make Milan your second home: the university residences offer well-maintained spaces, practical services, and an international community that allows you to fully enjoy the university experience. Living in a residence means having the opportunity to share moments of study and leisure with students from all over the world, building relationships that enrich your personal and academic journey. It is a stimulating experience, but one that requires a willingness to engage and share: **living together means respecting others, accepting compromises, and adapting your habits for the good of the group.** In this way, you will develop valuable transferable skills (flexibility, mediation skills, team spirit) that will be useful not only during your years of study but also in your future career.

Before making this choice, **consider whether this lifestyle aligns with your needs and well-being**: it is the foundation for successfully navigating the university journey that awaits you.

Find out here what to expect from our facilities and all the useful information for your stay in residence.

When your accommodation is assigned, you will be informed of the type of room you have been assigned.

The bedrooms at Bocconi-owned residences are all **single** rooms and are furnished with a bed, bedside table, desk, and wardrobe.

text:
Period of housing assignment

Open reservation monthly are always valid **from the first day of the month following** the month in which the reservation is made (i.e. if the application is submitted and accepted during the month of October, the student will be able to take possession of the room starting November 1st) unless otherwise specified in the date indicated next to the room type chosen within the application.

When filling out the application students will have to indicate the number of months intended to stay in the residence, which, we remind you, must be whole months.

**Please note:** Once the housing period is over it will not be possible to renew it, in case you need more time it will be necessary to submit the application again to check availability.

Room types and fees applied

During each of the Open reservation monthly sessions all the rooms not previously assigned will be made available for reservation. This means that not all Residence Halls and/or room types might be available, and in that case, they will not be listed in the options that you will find in the online application.

Before submitting your application, we invite you to verify the Bocconi Residence Halls and various room types available by checking the relevant sections of our website: in this way, you will already have an idea of the residences/room types that may fit your needs and that you would like to reserve, if available.

**Fees applied**

By participating in the Open reservation monthly, you will be able to reserve your preferred room type from those that become available when you access the online application.

The due fees will be the ones applied to the room type that you will have selected and confirmed — visible at the moment of the selection inside the application.

**Please note:** The Open reservation monthly are **exclusively at** **full rate**. Students interested in the preferential rate may only apply for the **Open reservation – recovery session**(November 2025).

Instructions for submitting the application

Before accessing the application take a look at the useful documents (Bocconi Residence Regulations a.y. 2025-26 and Privacy Policy) available at the following [link](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/current-students/housing/useful-documents).

Please have your login credentials ready, look for a fast internet connection, and use a single device to access the online application at the time of opening. When opening the online application, follow all the steps provided:

> ACCESS the link at the indicated opening time: you will be in a virtual "waiting room". When your turn comes, log in by entering your Bocconi credentials (student ID number/username and password).

> ENTER in the "Accommodation choice" section.

> SELECT THE RESIDENCE

If you do not see any options, it means that there are no longer available places.

\> SELECT ROOM TYPE

If you do not see any options, it means that there are no longer available places.

> CLICK ON "SAVE" at the bottom of the section.

If you can't click it means that there are no longer available places.

> CLICK ON "CONFIRM DATA / SUBMIT DATA"

If you are unable to click it means that there are no longer available places.

The reservation was successful only if the red "Confirm data/Submit data" button is no longer visible and in its place appears the words, "You confirmed the data on dd/mm/yyyy."

UPLOAD DOCUMENTS AND SUBMIT APPLICATION

Proceed by 11:59 p.m. (Italian time) on the same day to upload all documents available in application to be printed, hand signed and uploaded in the upload spaces provided, and to pay the security deposit. Click on "Submit application/ Submit application" by 11:59 p.m. (Italian time).

The office will verify that your reservation was successful and it will give it a result through MyApplication in the following days.

**Attention:**

metadata.title: Open reservation monthly a.y. 2025-26 | Bocconi University
metadata.heading_path: Open reservation monthly a.y. 2025-26 | Bocconi University

metadata.title: Open reservation monthly a.y. 2025-26 | Bocconi University
metadata.heading_path: Open reservation monthly a.y. 2025-26 | Bocconi University

text:
If in searching for a new option to select all available places are taken, the system would continue to show you, in the "Residence and Room Type" section, your original selection: this does NOT mean that the reservation was successful.

The office will verify that your reservation was successful.

**HOW TO SUBMIT THE DOCUMENTS CORRECTLY**

You must **print** all documents, **sign them by hand with a legible signature**, and upload them with **all** pages to the designated section no later than the application’s deadline.

In order to complete the application, it is necessary to click on the button "submit application" after having completed the 500 euros housing deposit payment and the upload of all the documents required, that are available in the online application.

Housing acceptance and next steps

After submitting your application, the Office will verify the correctness of the application you submitted.

In the following days you will view in MyApplication the housing result of your application, which contains the instructions you must follow to accept the accommodation. Acceptance by the student by the deadline will be essential to confirm the accommodation assignment for A.Y. 2025-26 and will consist of signing the "Housing Acceptance" document available in MyApplication after the result.

In the event of failure to accept housing, the reservation will be cancelled and the student will forfeit the housing assignment.

After housing acceptance, it will not be possible to cancel the assignment, which will be valid for the entire period of the assignment as accepted by the student, who agrees to pay the full housing fee provided for the academic year in question. There are a number of cases of renunciation and withdrawal, detailed on the dedicated page of the website: please take careful note of them.

**Documentation to certify housing assignment**

Throughout the academic year, the housing result of your online application will remain visible in MyApplication: you will be able to print it or download it as a pdf file if it will serve as proof of housing tenure; in fact, the housing result contains all the information generally needed for this purpose (name and address of residence, period of assignment, price of assigned housing).

**Room change**

Throughout the period in which the student is a guest of a Bocconi residence hall, room change is not permitted. Instead, it is the right of the University to transfer the resident even during the year to another Residence at the rate provided for the destination residence.

**Check-in and payments**

If you have been awarded and accepted a housing assignment, check the information regarding payment of the first installment of housing tuition a.y. 2025-26, online check-in and Life in the Bocconi dorms.

**Renewal of the housing assignment**

The housing assignment for A.Y. 2025-26 is granted for the academic year of application only; therefore, it is not automatically granted for subsequent academic years, but it is the student's responsibility to verify the possibility of renewal and to make subsequent applications for assignment in the manner that will be provided by the Housing Application Requirements and Regulations for each academic year of interest.

**ATTENTION**

Students assigned housing for whom it is subsequently determined that they have not been properly registered/enrolled for A.Y. 2025-26 will lose their eligibility to use the Housing Service for A.Y. 2025-26. The successful assignment will be cancelled automatically and students will be required to vacate the assigned housing immediately. It is specified that payments due will remain the student's responsibility even if the assignment is cancelled. Therefore, students are urged to pay special attention, before applying for accommodation, to the cancellation provisions specified on the dedicated page of the website.

For the purpose of ascertaining the truthfulness of the information provided, Università Bocconi will make use of the faculties provided for by current legal provisions.

Applications expired

text:
Housing

[Overview](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/current-students/housing)

The Open reservation monthly are residual housing assignments open to all Bocconi students regularly enrolled\* in a.y. 2025-26 and will be held regularly based on room availability, in order to meet as much as possible the demand for housing by students during the year. Only students who are genuinely interested in taking possession of a room are invited to apply at this stage so as not to limit or exhaust the choice for other students.

Open reservation monthly sessions will take place starting mid-September according to the dates indicated below that will regularly be updated depending on room availability. Each session will be confirmed the night before the opening of each session, in case of room availability.

**Available application sessions**

**Thursday, April 2nd, 2026, 3:00 pm (italian time) - cancelled**

Application active starting from the opening time 3:00 pm

The link to the online application will be posted here a few minutes before the specified opening time.

Before accessing the application take a look at the useful documents (Bocconi Residence Regulations a.y. 2024-25 and Privacy Policy) available at the following [link](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/current-students/housing/useful-documents).

Please have your login credentials ready, look for a fast internet connection, and use a single device to access the online application at the time of opening. When opening the online application, follow all the steps provided:

> ACCESS the link at the indicated opening time: you will be in a virtual "waiting room". When your turn comes, log in by entering your Bocconi credentials (student ID number/username and password).

> ENTER in the "Accommodation choice" section.

> SELECT THE RESIDENCE

If you do not see any options, it means that there are no longer available places.

\> SELECT ROOM TYPE

If you do not see any options, it means that there are no longer available places.

> CLICK ON "SAVE" at the bottom of the section.

If you can't click it means that there are no longer available places.

> CLICK ON "CONFIRM DATA / SUBMIT DATA"

If you are unable to click it means that there are no longer available places.

The reservation was successful only if the red "Confirm data/Submit data" button is no longer visible and in its place appears the words, "You confirmed the data on dd/mm/yyyy."

UPLOAD DOCUMENTS AND SUBMIT APPLICATION

Proceed by 11:59 p.m. (Italian time) on the same day to upload all documents available in application to be printed, hand signed and uploaded in the upload spaces provided, and to pay the security deposit. Click on "Submit application/ Submit application" by 11:59 p.m. (Italian time).

The office will verify that your reservation was successful and it will give it a result through MyApplication in the following days.

**Attention:**

metadata.title: Open reservation monthly | Bocconi University
metadata.heading_path: Open reservation monthly | Bocconi University

text:
If in searching for a new option to select all available places are taken, the system would continue to show you, in the "Residence and Room Type" section, your original selection: this does NOT mean that the reservation was successful.

The office will verify that your reservation was successful.

**HOW TO SUBMIT THE DOCUMENTS CORRECTLY**

You must **print** all documents, **sign them by hand with a legible signature**, and upload them with **all** pages to the designated section no later than the application’s deadline.

In order to complete the application, it is necessary to click on the button "submit application" after having completed the 500 euros housing deposit payment and the upload of all the documents required, that are available in the online application

Housing acceptance and next steps

After submitting your application, the Office will verify the correctness of the application you submitted.

In the following days you will view in MyApplication the housing result of your application, which contains the instructions you must follow to accept the accommodation. Acceptance by the student by the deadline will be essential to confirm the accommodation assignment for A.Y. 2024-25 and will consist of signing the "Housing Acceptance" document available in MyApplication after the result.

In the event of failure to accept housing, the reservation will be cancelled and the student will forfeit the housing assignment.

After housing acceptance, it will not be possible to cancel the assignment, which will be valid for the entire period of the assignment as accepted by the student, who agrees to pay the full housing fee provided for the academic year in question. There are a number of cases of renunciation and withdrawal, detailed on the dedicated page of the website: please take careful note of them.

**Documentation to certify housing assignment**

Throughout the academic year, the housing result of your online application will remain visible in MyApplication: you will be able to print it or download it as a pdf file if it will serve as proof of housing tenure; in fact, the housing result contains all the information generally needed for this purpose (name and address of residence, period of assignment, price of assigned housing).

**Room change**

Throughout the period in which the student is a guest of a Bocconi residence hall, room change is not permitted. Instead, it is the right of the University to transfer the resident even during the year to another Residence at the rate provided for the destination residence.

**Check-in and payments**

If you have been awarded and accepted a housing assignment, check the information regarding payment of the first installment of housing tuition a.y. 2024-25, online check-in and Life in the Bocconi dorms.

**Renewal of the housing assignment**

The housing assignment for A.Y. 2024-2025 is granted for the academic year of application only; therefore, it is not automatically granted for subsequent academic years, but it is the student's responsibility to verify the possibility of renewal and to make subsequent applications for assignment in the manner that will be provided by the Housing Application Requirements and Regulations for each academic year of interest.

**ATTENTION**

Students assigned housing for whom it is subsequently determined that they have not been properly registered/enrolled for A.Y. 2024-25 will lose their eligibility to use the Housing Service for A.Y. 2024-2025. The successful assignment will be cancelled automatically and students will be required to vacate the assigned housing immediately. It is specified that payments due will remain the student's responsibility even if the assignment is cancelled. Therefore, students are urged to pay special attention, before applying for accommodation, to the cancellation provisions specified on the dedicated page of the website.

For the purpose of ascertaining the truthfulness of the information provided, Università Bocconi will make use of the faculties provided for by current legal provisions.

text:
In order to satisfy all the need of students of the Right to University, according to the housing application timeline for a.y. 2024-25, a new "recovery" session of Open reservation has been introduced. This session will allow students who will result eligible for the ISU Bocconi Scholarship a.y. 2024-25 during the autumn 2024 to request the housing rate change with respect to the rate already applied for a.y. 2024-25 (if already assignees of a room at full rate) or to request a housing new admission at preferential rate for a.y. 2024-25 (if not yet assignees of a room).
|     |
| --- |
| Only students who will result eligible for the ISU Bocconi Scholarship a.y. 2024-25 will be entitled to participate to the Open reservation — recovery session (preferential rate) |
By participating to the Open reservation — recovery session, one of the following requests may be submitted:

**1\. Housing rate change for a.y. 2024-25**

This request may be submitted only by students who:
- are assignees of a room at full rate for a.y. 2024-25 (in any previous assignment session);
- resulted eligible for the ISU Bocconi Scholarship a.y. 2024-25.
In case the request will be accepted:
- the preferential rate will be applied starting from the second housing installment and there will be no adjustment of the first housing installment already paid;
- the rate change will be applied only if the student who is requesting it will be eligible for the ISU Bocconi Scholarship a.y. 2024-25;
- the rate change will be applied only if the room occupied by the student for a.y. 2024-25 is one of the room types available also at preferential rate.
It is specified that the rate change will be subject to availability of rooms that can be assigned at preferential rate possibly left after all the previous preferential rate applications, or after the "Renunciation/ Withdrawal" period, and always up to the number of rooms defined in the Housing Application Requirements and Regulations a.y. 2024-25.

**2\. Preferential rate new admission housing application for a.y. 2024-25**

This request may be submitted only by students who:
- are NOT assignees of a room at full rate for a.y. 2024-25
- resulted eligible for the ISU Bocconi Scholarship a.y. 2024-25
The housing assignment, valid from January 2025, will be subject to availability of rooms that can be assigned at preferential rate and up to the number of rooms defined in the Housing Application Requirements and Regulations a.y. 2024-25. For these room assignments, all the preferential rate rooms possibly left after all the previous preferential rate applications (included the housing rate change requests) or after the "Renunciation/ Withdrawal" period, will be used.

In the event that the number of applicants will exceed the number of rooms available, the room assignments will happen by giving priority to:
- non resident students
- 1st year students
- increasing amount of the ISEE/ISEEU parameter

This application may be submitted in the period from **November 4th to the 8th, 2024** through the dedicated link that will be published on this page of our website.

In the event of a **preferential rate new admission housing application** with a negative result due to non-availability of assignable housing at preferential rate, the student may apply for the Open reservation at full rate (during the first session in **December 2024**).

text:
A preferential rate assignment may be requested only by students who:
- **Meet the economic requirements** established by the Lombardy Region for the access to the benefits of the Right to University Education for the a.y. 2025-26 and the **necessary documentation**: please refer to the [**dedicated page**](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/bachelor-and-law-programs/housing/economic-requirements-submission-housing-application-ay-2025-26 "Economic requirements for the submission of housing application a.y. 2025-26") for all information. For the purpose of ascertaining the economic conditions and the truthfulness of the information provided, Bocconi University will make use of the faculties provided for by the current provisions of the law. Information on ascertaining the economic conditions and veracity of the statements provided is available at the following [link](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/bachelor-and-law-programs/housing/verification-financial-status-and-validation-economic-information-and "Verification of Financial Status and Validation of Economic Information and Documentation Provided").

- **are non-residents**, meaning living in a municipality from which it is possible to reach the location of the study course attended by public transportation, with travel times exceeding 90 minutes(\*)
The only exception are students interested in applying during the “Open reservation – recovery session”, for whom this requirement does not have to be strictly fulfilled;
- **do not fall under any of the** [**grounds for exclusion**](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/bachelor-and-law-programs/housing/grounds-exclusion-preferential-rate "Grounds for exclusion - preferential rate") **.**

- **in possession of the minimum number of credits required** to submit the application, detailed in the following point 2 "Credits required to submit the application"

- **will enroll for a.y. 2025-26:**

- for Bachelor programs: to the first, second, third or first "fuori corso" year of the third year

- for the Integrated Master of Arts in Law: to the first, second, third, fourth, fifth or first "fuori corso" year of the fifth year

- for Master of Science programs: to the first, second, or first "fuori corso" year of the second year

- **not already assignees of housing** **upon payment, or free of charge, or at a reduced rate for the academic year 2025-2026.** In fact, students who have already been assigned housing and submit or have submitted other housing requests of any type for the same academic year may only benefit from the first housing assignment they accepted. Therefore, housing requests submitted by students who have already been assigned accommodation for the same academic year will be canceled.

metadata.title: Preferential rate a.y. 2025-26 | Bocconi University
metadata.heading_path: Preferential rate a.y. 2025-26 | Bocconi University

text:
**Students who are recipient of financial aid that includes** free **accommodation**(e.g., Una Scelta Possibile) or accommodation at reduced rate (e.g., Moving to Milan), upon acceptance of the benefit, renounce the possibility of receiving any another type of housing assignment (preferential rate, full rate) for the academic year of the first assignment and subsequent years (if the financial aid is renewed). Acceptance will result in the automatic cancellation of any housing request submitted and/or of any housing assignment received. It is also specified that after acceptance, no further housing requests of any type can be submitted.

The number of rooms available at preferential rate is usually lower than the applications submitted. Regularly enrolled students will be considered as a priority: applications submitted by students transferring from other Universities or repeating any year of course will not be accepted. Detailed rules on verifications carried out on years of enrollment are available in the Housing Application Requirements and Regulations a.y. 2025-26.

It is also specified, exclusively for students enrolled for a.y. 2025-26 to the first year of a Bachelor, Integrated Master of Arts in Law or Master of Science program **,** that they can apply for Preferential rate new admission application only after having submitted the “ISU Bocconi Scholarship a.y. 2025-26” application.

(\*) The travel times to be calculated are the minimum times required, based on the public transport route, between the departure station/stop from the place of residence and the arrival station/stop at the study location, including waiting times at intermediate stops. Walking routes or private transportation are excluded. These times can be verified on the regional website [www.muoversi.regione.lombardia.it](http://www.muoversi.regione.lombardia.it/) and, for cities outside the Lombardy Region, through the Google Maps search engine at [www.google.it/maps](http://www.google.it/maps)

2\. Credits required to submit the application

In the application sessions "Preferential rate renewal application" and "Preferential rate new admission application" will be evaluated only applications from students who have earned the number of credits specified below no later than: 1 of February, 2025 for Bachelor and Master of Science programs, and by 22 of March, 2025for Integrated Master of Arts in Law program.

It is specified that:

>First year students of the Bachelor or Integrated Master of Arts in Law programs are not required to reach this minimum number of credits if they wish to apply for the "Preferential rate new admission application"

>A minimum number of credits is not required to students who wish to apply for the "Open reservation — recovery session" application.

**Minimum number of credits required**

**11 credits** for those enrolled in the first year (bachelor, master of science and integrated master of arts in law programs) in a.y. 2024-25

**60 credits** for those enrolled in the second year (bachelor or integrated master of arts in law programs) in a.y. 2024-25

**120 credits** for those enrolled in a.y. 2024-25 in the third year or first year “fuori corso” of a bachelor program who will enroll for a.y. 2025-26 in the first year of a master of science program at Bocconi, or those enrolled in a.y. 2024-25 in the third year of integrated master of arts in law programs

**180 credits** for those enrolled in the fourth year of an integrated master of arts in law program in a.y. 2024-25

**240 credits** for those enrolled in the fifth year of an integrated master of arts in law program in a.y. 2024-25

metadata.title: Preferential rate a.y. 2025-26 | Bocconi University
metadata.heading_path: Preferential rate a.y. 2025-26 | Bocconi University

text:
It is specified that for the achievement of the minimum number of credits required at the end of the winter session there is **NO use of bonus credits** in addition to the credits actually earned by the student.

For students who have participated in an Exchange program during the first semester, the timing of recognition of exams taken abroad will be considered. Such students are invited to still apply for housing renewal if interested and to monitor the credit recognition in order to complete it as soon as possible. Please note that no flexibility can be applied in relation to the achievement of the merit requirement for accommodation - credits to be achieved by August 10, 2025. (please see paragraph 5)

It is also specified that for students with disability pursuant to Italian Law n.104/1992 or with civil disability equal or greater than 66%, the number of minimum credits may deviate up to a maximum of 40% from the number of credits indicated above.

3\. Application submission

The housing assignment for A.Y. 2025-26 is granted for the academic year of application only, therefore, it is not automatically renewed for subsequent academic years, but it is the student's responsibility to check whether it can be renewed and to make subsequent applications for assignment in the ways that will be provided by the Housing Application Requirements and Regulations for each academic year of interest.

Throughout the period in which the student is a resident in a Bocconi residence hall, room changes are not permitted. Instead, it is the right of Bocconi University to transfer the student, even during the year, to another residence hall at the rate provided for the new residence.

Before accessing the online application:

>see the useful documents available at this [link](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/current-students/housing/useful-documents "Useful documents")

>prepare the documentation required to access to the benefits of the Right to University Education for the a.y. 2025-26

**Preferential rate renewal application a.y. 2025-26**

**from 20 to 27 February 2025**

Preferential rate renewal application a.y. 2025-26

Available only for students who are already guests at preferential rate as of 20 February 2025.

If for A.Y. 2025-26 you are in possession of an ISEE/ISEEU parificato certificate with ISEE/ISEEU parificato and/or an ISPE/ISPEU parificato values above the required limits, you can apply for full rate housing renewal.

[**ONLINE APPLICATION**](https://admissions.unibocconi.it/admissions/Students/OpenFromExtUrl?concourseId=13196&ordType=)

**Preferential rate new admission application a.y. 2025-26**

**from 20 to 27 February 2025**

Preferential rate new admission application a.y. a.y. 2025-26

**Attention**: students enrolled for a.y. 2025-26 to the first year of a Bachelor, Integrated Master of Arts in Law or Master of Science program **can apply for Preferential rate new admission application only after having submitted the “ISU Bocconi Scholarship a.y. 2025-26” application.**

Through this application will be assigned the remaining availability after the Preferential rate housing renewal application and within the number of beds defined on the Housing Application Requirements and Regulations A.Y. 2025-26 (understood as specific number of beds per single residence). Students who will be eligible for new admission at Preferential rate housing for A.Y. 2025-26 will be assigned housing. In case the number of applicants exceeds the number of available places, the assignment will be made according to the ranking list following the order described in the Housing Application Requirements and Regulations A.Y. 2025-26.

metadata.title: Preferential rate a.y. 2025-26 | Bocconi University
metadata.heading_path: Preferential rate a.y. 2025-26 | Bocconi University

text:
[**ONLINE APPLICATION**](https://admissions.unibocconi.it/admissions/Students/OpenFromExtUrl?concourseId=13197&ordType=)

[**Open reservation recovery session a.y. 2025-26**](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/bachelor-and-law-programs/housing/open-reservation-recovery-session-ay-2025-26 "Open reservation - recovery session a.y 2025-26")

**from 5 to 9 november 2025**

See the dedicated webpage for more information.

Applications submitted after the deadline and/or with submission methods that do not comply with the prescribed procedure and/or with incomplete documentation will not be taken into consideration.

After submitting your application, monitor in the "Notifications" area of MyApplication for communications from the Office, which may indicate the need for additions or integrations of documents.

**How to upload the documents correctly**

You must print all documents, sign them by hand with a legible signature, and upload them with all pages to the designated section no later than the application’s deadline. In order to complete the application, it is necessary to click on the button "submit application" after having completed the 600 euros housing deposit payment and the upload of all the documents required, that are available in the online application. The signature on the documents must be handwritten and match the signature on the ID submitted.

4\. Results and acceptance

**Preferential rate renewal application result**

The result will be made available within early April2025 on MyApplication. For the renewal application, no subsequent steps of acceptance are required, the room is assigned.

**Preferential rate new admission application result and acceptance**

The result will be made available within early April 2025 on MyApplication.

If the result is positive, you will receive a preferential rate housing assignment for A.Y. 2025-26. On the result, you will be notified the residence assigned, the room type, the period of assignment and the applicable Bocconi ISU bracket, which may change following the Lombardy Region's resolution on the final ISEEU/ISPEU parameters. The assignment offer received cannot be changed and no room changes are expected.

If you wish to accept the offer of accommodation received, proceed to pay the security deposit of 600 euros and upload all the required documents by the date that will be indicated in the result. If you fail to complete all the steps required to accept the housing assignment received by that deadline, your assignment will automatically be cancelled.

**Open reservation recovery session result and acceptance**

The result will be made available in the month of November 2025 on MyApplication.

Rate change

If the result is positive, you will receive a preferential rate housing assignment for A.Y. 2025-26. On the result, you will be notified the residence assigned, the room type, the period of assignment and the applicable Bocconi ISU bracket. No subsequent steps of acceptance are required.

In the event of a request of housing rate change with a negative result due to non-availability of assignable housing at preferential rate (as specified above), the student may apply for withdrawal by and no later than November 2025.

New admissions

If the result is positive, you will receive a preferential rate housing assignment for A.Y. 2025-26. On the result, you will be notified the residence assigned, the room type, the period of assignment and the applicable Bocconi ISU bracket. The assignment offer received cannot be changed and no room changes are expected.

If you wish to accept the offer of accommodation received, proceed to pay the security deposit of 500 euros and upload all the required documents by the date that will be indicated in the result.

metadata.title: Preferential rate a.y. 2025-26 | Bocconi University
metadata.heading_path: Preferential rate a.y. 2025-26 | Bocconi University

text:
If you fail to complete all the steps required to accept the housing assignment received by that deadline, your assignment will automatically be cancelled.

In the event of a preferential rate new admission housing application (recovery session) with a negative result due to non-availability of assignable housing at preferential rate, the student may apply for the Open reservation at full rate (during the first session in December 2025).

5\. Requirements needed to use the accommodation

Students who will result housing assignees for a.y. 2025-26 following the procedure described above will be able to use the assigned accommodation only in presence of the following conditions:

**1) REGULAR ENROLLMENT for a.y. 2025-26**

\> regular enrollment for the absolute first time for a.y. 2025-26 in the first regular year of a Master of Science (i.e. bachelor Bocconi students going to the Master of Science program)

or

\> regular enrollment for a.y. 2025-26 for the absolute first time in a regular year subsequent to the first of a Bachelor of Science, Master of Science, Integrated Master of arts in Law or PhD program. Also students enrolled in the 1st year “fuori corso” of a Bachelor of Science, Master of Science, Integrated Master of Arts in Law program will be able to reside in the Bocconi residence halls.

It is specified that the years of enrollment are counted for each study cycle starting from the absolute first year of enrollment\*.

It is specified that for students with a disability pursuant to Italian Law n.104/1992 or with civil disability equal or greater than 66% can reside in the Bocconi Residence Halls at a preferential rate also if enrolled for a.y. 2024-25 in the 2nd year “fuori corso” year of a Bachelor of Science, Master of Science, Integrated Master of Arts in Law program.

\*The absolute first year of enrollment shall be understood as any academic year of first enrollment in any kind of degree program (even if different from the one attended in the a.y. 2025-26) which required the same education qualification as the one needed to access the attended program in the a.y. 2025-26, in any University in Italy or abroad, even if the program has not been completed.

**2) MERIT REQUIREMENT**

For the purpose of eligibility to use the accommodation, the rules established in terms of merit requirements and detailed on the [**dedicated webpage**](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/bachelor-and-law-programs/housing/merit-requirements-ay-2025-26 "Merit requirements a.y. 2025-26") for the different types of housing applications apply.

6\. Payment

Before your arrival at the residence for a.y. 2025-26 you will have to pay the housing 1st installment: the deadline will be August 5th, 2025. You will see the amount due on your you@B once you'll have completed your enrollment for a.y. 2025-26. We recommend you to make the payment through the **Flywire tool** system.

[**Fees, deadlines and methods of payment a.y. 2025-26**](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/current-students/housing/fees-deadlines-and-methods-payment-ay-2025-26 "Fees, deadlines and methods of payment a.y. 2025-26")

metadata.title: Preferential rate a.y. 2025-26 | Bocconi University
metadata.heading_path: Preferential rate a.y. 2025-26 | Bocconi University

text:
Please consider that the calculation of the housing installment is carried out at the beginning of July for all housing assignees, regardless of their situation in terms of reaching the merit and the enrollment requirement (see point 5) that the office cannot verify before August 10. The possibility of seeing the due payment on you@B does **not** entail an unconditional room assignment, which is always subject to the possession of the enrollment and merit requirements. In absence of the requirements needed to use the assigned room, the office will proceed with the cancellation of your housing assignment, but you will still be required to pay the first installment (it will not be possible to cancel the due amount).

In the event you will pay the amount due but after a subsequent verification the merit and enrollment requirement will not be met, the amount you paid will not be refunded and the housing assignment will be cancelled in any case.

Please remember that the University grants the right to leave the accommodation early and to withdraw from the commitment to such payment, exclusively in the foreseen cases of renunciation of the accommodation, proven by the specific academic reasons required for the acceptance of the renunciation request, and withdrawal from the accommodation, according to what detailed on the dedicated website pages.

7\. Cancellation in case of lack of the requirements

Students assigned housing for whom it is subsequently determined that they did not regularly enroll for the a.y. 2025-26 or did not meet the merit requirements will lose their right (eligibility) to use the Housing Service for the a.y. 2025-26. The assignment will be cancelled by the office and students will be required to leave the assigned accommodation immediately. It is specified that the payments due will remain the responsibility of the student even in the event of cancellation of the assignment. For this reason, before submitting a housing application, students are invited to pay particular attention to the provisions regarding the [**cancellation**](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/bachelor-and-law-programs/housing/cancellation-ay-2025-26 "Cancellation a.y. 2025-26") of the housing assignment, specified on the dedicated webpage.

8\. Residence halls calendar and extraordinary openings

Bocconi residences will be open from late August 2025 to late June 2026. The standard assignment period for the 2025-26 academic year will meet the academic needs of most students.

There are no time restrictions for entry or exit for residence guests. However, there are restrictions for external guests, whose presence in the residence is allowed exclusively between 7:00 AM and 12:00 AM.

**Important check-out note**

Regardless of the end date of your housing assignment, we remind you that **at the end of your housing assignment period, you must completely clear your room and apartment of all your belongings**, even if you will return to the same room the following year. In fact, as specified in the Bocconi Residences Regulations:

_At the time of check-out for the end of the assignment period or during the year, the student is required to completely empty their room and other areas of their accommodation (bathroom, kitchen, living room, where present), including completely emptying refrigerators and freezers. Bocconi University is not responsible for goods left in the apartment/room after check-out._

Attention: rooms are reassigned to Summer School students during the summer, so it is not possible to leave anything inside your room or apartment. **Any issues related to missing or deteriorated items during the summer, a period when the room is not assigned, cannot be considered** by Bocconi University or the residence management.

If necessary, we suggest you consider luggage storage services that are very common in Milan, such as Boxok, Redbox Storage, Radical Storage, and Casaforte Milano.

metadata.heading_path: Preferential rate a.y. 2025-26 | Bocconi University

text:
Regarding stays during extraordinary opening periods (Winter break 2025 and July 2026), a separate request will be necessary (information available soon).

9\. Students with disabilities

Bocconi University has accommodations in each residence hall that are designed to accommodate students with disabilities in order to offer them the possibility to easily live their university experience in a collective context that meets their needs. Students with disabilities who require special housing needs may contact the Office of Fees, Funding and Housing, which will evaluate, with each student, which housing is best suited to their specific needs. All reported issues and provided documentation will be treated confidentially and subject to applicable privacy regulations. In order for the Office to be able to satisfy the requests received, it is best to clarify your needs in advance. Interested students are advised to contact the Fees, Funding and Housing Office before submitting their housing application.

[More…](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/current-students/housing/preferential-rate-ay-2025-26#addtoany "Show all")

text:
Housing

[Overview](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/current-students/housing)

The preferential rate for the accommodation service can only be applied to students who are in need but deserving and who meet the requirements (in terms of merit and income) for the ISU Bocconi Scholarship for the Right to University Education. For the preferential rate, 3 different fee levels based on the ISU brackets (1st, 2nd and 3rd ISU bracket) are foreseen, depending on the values indicated on the ISEE/ISEEU Parificato Certificate submitted at the moment of the application. For all other students the full rate is applied.

On this webpage, all the details about requirements, methods and deadlines of application, results and requirements needed to use the accommodation are explained.

**Before applying, be sure to carefully read the contents of paragraphs 1-9 on this page**.

You can access the application you are interested in through the boxes at the top of the page; links will be available during the application period.

Application available from 20 to 27 February 2025.

Only for students who are already guests at preferential rate as of 20 February 2025.

[Online application (expired)](https://www.unibocconi.it/en)

Application available from 20 to 27 February 2025.

Attention: students enrolled for a.y. 2025-26 to the first year of a Bachelor, Integrated Master of Arts in Law or Master of Science program can apply for Preferential rate new admission application only after having submitted the “ISU Bocconi Scholarship a.y. 2025-26” application.

[Online application (expired)](https://www.unibocconi.it/en)

Application available from 5 to 9 November 2025

Only students who will result eligible for the ISU Bocconi Scholarship a.y. 2025-26 will be entitled to participate to the Open reservation — recovery session (preferential rate)

[Find out more](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/applying-bocconi/bachelor-and-law-programs/housing/open-reservation-recovery-session-ay-2025-26)

Through the "Renewal" and the "New admission" application, rooms for the standard assignment period (late August 2025 — June 2026) will be assigned; this period meets the academic needs of most students.

Through the "Open reservation — recovery session" application, rooms at preferential rate will be assigned for the period January-June 2026.

Throughout the period in which the student is a resident in a Bocconi residence hall, room changes are not permitted. Instead, it is the right of Bocconi University to transfer the student, even during the year, to another residence hall at the rate provided for the new residence.

It is possible to renounce from the housing assignment exclusively for expected academic reasons and only within the time windows detailed below.

Have received confirmation of departure for exchange or internship for a.y. 2025-26.

**The application will be immediately accepted and the room assigned for 2025-26 will be cancelled.**

text:
## **a. Disciplinary Procedures**

A student who receives a disciplinary sanction of exclusion from Università Bocconi during the year incurs **revocation of the housing assignment with consequent expulsion from the residence hall** and loss of the security deposit. In this case the student will have to permanently leave the housing assigned to him/her.

A student who receives a disciplinary sanction of suspension from exams and partial exams during the year will not incur revocation of the housing assignment, however, if he or she has an assignment at preferential rate, he or she will undergo the **change of rate from preferential to full rate**, and will therefore be required to pay the housing fee at the full rate starting from the first installment due after the sanction is communicated.

metadata.title: Revocation | Bocconi University
metadata.heading_path: **a. Disciplinary Procedures**

text:
## **b. Serious violation of the Bocconi Residence Regulations**

A student who during the course of the year incurs disciplinary sanctions in excess of a warning imposed by the university incurs **revocation of the housing assignment resulting in the expulsion from the residence hall** and loss of the security deposit. In this case, the student must permanently leave the housing assigned.

The university reserves the right to refer the student to the Disciplinary Committee.

The university also reserves the right in this case to order the ineligibility of the student to use the Housing Service for the entire duration of the study cycle.

metadata.title: Revocation | Bocconi University
metadata.heading_path: **b. Serious violation of the Bocconi Residence Regulations**

text:
## **c. False declarations**

A student who submits/has submitted/ untrue statements incurs **revocation of the housing assignment resulting in expulsion from the residence hall** and loss of the security deposit. In this case, the student must immediately and permanently leave the housing assigned. The sanctions provided for in Articles 75 and 76 of Presidential Decree 445/2000 will also be applied, as well as the sanctions provided for in Article 10, paragraph 3 of Legislative Decree 68/2012 consisting in the loss of the right to obtain other disbursements for the entire duration of the course of studies, the payment of a sum three times the value of the services unduly used, without prejudice in any case to the application of the sanctions provided for in Article 38, paragraph 3, of Legislative Decree No. 78/2010 as well as the criminal provisions for facts constituting a crime.

Università Bocconi reserves the right to adopt disciplinary sanctions and, if the elements of a crime are found to exist (art. 331 c.p.p.), reporting to the judicial authorities.

[More…](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/current-students/housing/revocation#addtoany "Show all")

text:
**Please note that:**
- In case of rooms with shared bathroom, it is necessary that the subleasing student is of the same gender of the student who sublets his/her room.

- The room can be temporarily sublet only for full months.

- According to the agreement in place among the student who is temporary leaving the room and the subleasing student, it will be possible to sublet the room for one or more consecutivemonths, as long as they belong to the same semester (i.e. the period from September to January for the 1° semester and the period from January to June for the 2° semester). The participation in the international program will be verified by the competent offices.

- The student who will temporarily occupy the room will not have to meet economic or merit requirements.
Housing fees calculation in case of temporary sublease

With reference to the due housing fees in case of temporary sublease, it is specified that:
- For students involved in the temporary sublease, the housing fees will be determined according to the monthly fee.

- Should the room be at the **FULL RATE**, the student who will temporary occupy the room will pay for the accommodation exclusively at full rate (monthly fee).
Should the room be at **PREFERENCIAL RATE**, the student who will temporary occupy the room will pay for the accommodation at full rate except in one of the following cases:
- The student who will temporarily occupy the room have applied for “preferential rate new admission a.y. 2024-25” (results in March 2024) and had a housing assignment (later not accepted by himself) or a non- housing assignment due to lack of places ( **note1**). In these cases, at the time of the sublease/take over request, the student concerned may request to pay at the preferential rate.
or
- Should the room be at **preferential rate**, the student who will temporary occupy the room will be eligible for this rate only in the event that they have applied for the "ISU Bocconi Scholarship a.y. 2024-25" and that, following the result announcement of the final ranking list drawn up by the end of October 2024, they have been found eligible for the ISU Bocconi scholarship and has thus been assigned one of the ISU Bocconi brackets. In this case it is specified that the preferential rate will be applied only to the installments expected to expire AFTER the definition of its eligibility. If the incoming person has to pay an installment **before** the publication of the results of the ISU rankings - therefore who has agreed to take over for a period between September and December - he will have to pay the full rate.
**Note1**

The students received the following result: “we regret to inform you that is was NOT possible to assign you a room at preferential rate in one of our Bocconi on campus residences for the a.y. 2024-2025 as the number of applicants exceeded the number of available spots reserved for the right to university education assistance a.y. 2024-2025”.

Application submission

Temporary sublease applications can be submitted only by 2024-25 room assignees who meet the merit and/or economic and enrollment requirements as defined for housing applications.

In case of non-compliance with one or more requirements and subsequent revocation of housing assignment, the temporary sublease application will NOT be considered valid.

The student who sublets their room is responsible for any missing payments and, should that be the case, they will be required to reimburse the University.

The temporary sublease application will need to be submitted through the online procedure that can be accessed from the "Links" box, and only during the following periods:

ONLINE APPLICATION – INCOMING STUDENTS (Second Semester)

Role of FFH Office

Temporary sublease agreements are **supervised** by Fees, Funding and Housing Office **only** from an administrative point of view (collection and verification of the documentation, issue of the relevant period MAV payments, checks with the competent offices) and organizational point of view (communication with Bocconi residences concerning students involved and period of assignment) in order to facilitate and support students taking part in mobility programs or students looking for a temporary accommodation.

If a **shared need of modification** of the sublease agreement emerges **after** the deal is made (ex. extension or reduction of the period of stay), the students involved in the temporary sublease must jointly and **in agreement with each other** contact the Office, who will consider the request and carry out the necessary administrative procedures.

On the contrary, should any misunderstanding or conflicting needs arise between the students involved in the sublease, the Office will **NOT** intervene, and only the original agreement, formerly confirmed by the Office, will be considered as valid. The Office will intervene with the necessary administrative steps just in case the students involved in the sublease will find a mutual agreement among themselves, and when they will communicate to the Office the **modification request jointly and in a written form.**

Please note that it is **NOT** possible to cancel the temporary sublease agreement.

Periods and payments
- The period must be agreed between you and must correspond to that of the international experience; it will be possible to sublet the room for one or more **consecutive** months, as long **as they belong to the same semester** (i.e. the period from September to January for the 1° semester and the period from January to June for the 2° semester).

- It will be possible to sublet your room also for **the entire academic year,** submitting two separate temporary sublease applications – the first in July, the second in November.

- Each student will pay the monthly rate for the type of room for their actual months of stay, receiving the MAV in the you@B diary.
Note that temporary sublease is **not allowed** if the student takes part in a mobility program that takes place online, through distance learning.

If you will be assigned a room in one of the Bocconi residence Halls for a.y. 2024-25 and during the same academic year you will take part in the Exchange program, Free Mover or will participate in an off campus internship recognized by Bocconi University (verified by the competent offices), you can ask to temporarily sublet your room to another Bocconi student, who must be **regularly enrolled in the a.y. 2024-25** in a Bachelor, Master of Science or Integrated Master of Arts in Law program, in correspondence of the period during which you will take part in the international experience.

**Attention – only for students scheduled to depart for US destinations during the first semester**

Exclusively for students with exchange destinations in the USA during the first semester who have not confirmed their departure by the June 8th deadline, the following options are available:
- Immediately find a sublease and submit the appropriate temporary sublease application, explicitly informing the incoming student about the possibility that the agreement may be canceled in case of non-departure. In this case, the outgoing student must also send an email to the office ( [housing@unibocconi.it](mailto:housing@unibocconi.it)) by June 10th, with subject USA EXCHANGE 1st SEMESTER, copying the incoming student and specifying that the submitted application should not be considered definitive, but that by July 25th, 2025, they will confirm their departure (and thus the actual sublease of the room) or their non-departure (and thus the cancellation of the sublease agreement).
or
- Wait and do not submit the application; even after the temporary sublease application closure and after having obtained their visa, but no later than July 25th, they will have the opportunity to write to the office ( [housing@unibocconi.it](mailto:housing@unibocconi.it)) communicating their intention to sublet their accommodation and indicating the name of the found incoming student; the office will then activate the application for both parties. In this case as well, the outgoing must send an email to the office ( [housing@unibocconi.it](mailto:housing@unibocconi.it)) by June 10th, with subject USA EXCHANGE 1st SEMESTER, to communicate that they are considering this option.
Students who do not write to the office by June 10th for either the first or second case will be considered "definitive" in their choices and will not be taken into consideration for any changes.

- **Late October 2025** for students who take part in the international program during the II semester a.y. 2025-26.

text:
Temporary sublease application – FIRST semester a.y. 2025-26

PLEASE NOTE: Both the Outgoing and the Incoming are required to complete their dedicated application. Should one of the two applications not be submitted, the Temporary Sublease request will be rejected.

ONLINE APPLICATION – OUTGOING STUDENTS (First Semester)

ONLINE APPLICATION – INCOMING STUDENTS (First Semester)

**Temporary sublease application – SECOND semester a.y. 2025-26**

PLEASE NOTE: Both the Outgoing and the Incoming are required to complete their dedicated application. Should one of the two applications not be submitted, the Temporary Sublease request will be rejected.

ONLINE APPLICATION – OUTGOING STUDENTS (Second Semester)

ONLINE APPLICATION – INCOMING STUDENTS (Second Semester)

Role of the office

Temporary sublease agreements are **supervised** by Fees, Funding and Housing Office **only** from an administrative point of view (collection and verification of the documentation, issue of the relevant period MAV payments, checks with the competent offices) and organizational point of view (communication with Bocconi residences concerning students involved and period of assignment) in order to facilitate and support students taking part in mobility programs or students looking for a temporary accommodation.

If a **shared need of modification** of the sublease agreement emerges **after** the deal is made (ex. extension or reduction of the period of stay), the students involved in the temporary sublease must jointly and **in agreement with each other** contact the Office, who will consider the request and carry out the necessary administrative procedures.

On the contrary, should any misunderstanding or conflicting needs arise between the students involved in the sublease, the Office will **NOT** intervene, and only the original agreement, formerly confirmed by the Office, will be considered as valid. The Office will intervene with the necessary administrative steps just in case the students involved in the sublease will find a mutual agreement among themselves, and when they will communicate to the Office the **modification request jointly and in a written form.**

Please note that it is **NOT** possible to cancel the temporary sublease agreement.

Periods and payments
- The period must be agreed between you and must correspond to that of the international experience; it will be possible to sublet the room for one or more **consecutive** months, as long **as they belong to the same semester** (i.e. the period from September to January for the 1° semester and the period from January to June for the 2° semester).

- It will be possible to sublet your room also for **the entire academic year,** submitting two separate temporary sublease applications – the first in July, the second in November.

- Each student will pay the monthly rate for the type of room for their actual months of stay, receiving the MAV in the you@B diary.
Note that temporary sublease is **not allowed** if the student takes part in a mobility program that takes place online, through distance learning.

[More…](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/current-students/housing/temporary-sublease-ay-2025-26#addtoany "Show all")

If you will be assigned a room in one of the Bocconi residence Halls for a.y. 2025-26 and during the same academic year you will take part in the Exchange program, Free Mover or will participate in an off campus internship recognized by Bocconi University (verified by the competent offices), you can ask to temporarily sublet your room to another Bocconi student, who must be **regularly enrolled in the a.y. 2025-26** in a Bachelor, Master of Science or Integrated Master of Arts in Law program, in correspondence of the period during which you will take part in the international experience.

It is in student responsibility to find and indicate the name of a Bocconi student interested in temporarily occupying your room. We suggest you to visit the [**link**](https://www.facebook.com/groups/187502362158325) to the unofficial Facebook group handled by student representatives, that may be useful to find another Bocconi student interested in a temporary room assignment.

text:
### _**1\. Explore the Library: take a tour**_

The Bocconi Library welcomes you with a variety of spaces designed to meet different study needs, shelves featuring curated collections, and exhibitions to explore. If you'd like to better orient yourself, you can request a guided tour with our staff.

The Library is open Monday to Sunday, from 8:30 a.m. to midnight. You can always check the most up-to-date opening hours on the [dedicated webpage](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/current-students/library-archives/opening-hours "Opening Hours").

metadata.title: Welcome in Bocconi! 4 ways to get the most out of the Library | Bocconi University
metadata.heading_path: Welcome in Bocconi! 4 ways to get the most out of the Library | Bocconi University > _**1\. Explore the Library: take a tour**_

text:
### _**2\. Get to know the Library website**_

Learning how to search for information is one of the most valuable skills you'll develop at university. Whether you're working on an essay, a presentation, or a group project, relying on Google or AI tools can be limiting — and sometimes risky. Why not start with a curated selection of reliable academic sources? That’s exactly what the [Library website](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/current-students/library-archives) offers.

Right at the center of the homepage, you’ll find a search bar that gives you access to books, e-books, articles, theses, databases, and other online resources made available by the University.

A great place to start with are [LibGuides](https://unibocconi.libguides.com/) – thematic guides created by Library staff to help you navigate key topics. For example:

- [Freshers](https://unibocconi.libguides.com/freshers), for an overview of the main services available to new students
- [Course reserves](https://unibocconi.libguides.com/coursereserves), your go-to guide for quickly finding your courses' reading lists

And there’s so much more: the Library website is a tool designed to support you every step of the way. Explore it now!

metadata.title: Welcome in Bocconi! 4 ways to get the most out of the Library | Bocconi University
metadata.heading_path: Welcome in Bocconi! 4 ways to get the most out of the Library | Bocconi University > _**2\. Get to know the Library website**_

text:
### _**3\. Attend a Library workshop!**_

The Library organises workshops to present resources and databases and to support you with citations and bibliography for your written texts. Here are the upcoming workshops:

- **Discover the Library!**-\> to discover all the tools available for your courses, assignments and exams! At the end of this workshop, you will know where to find all the resources and data you need and get the most out of the Library.

28 August, 2.30-3.30 pm, online, in English

2 September, 3-4 pm, in person, in English

- **Citation and Bibliography** -\> to learn how to recognize different sources and cite them correctly in your texts and bibliographies.

27 August, 10-11.15 am, online, in English

3 September, 10.30-11.45 am, in person, in Italian

More details on the [Library Workshops](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/current-students/library-archives/teaching-and-research-support/library-workshops "Library Workshops") page.

metadata.heading_path: Welcome in Bocconi! 4 ways to get the most out of the Library | Bocconi University > _**3\. Attend a Library workshop!**_

text:
### _**4\. Know where to get help**_

The Library staff is always here to help. Here’s how you can get in touch with us:

- Visit the [Information Desk](https://bocconi.stackmap.com/explore/1?c=97), located at the center of the Library
- Contact us via [email](mailto:infobiblio@unibocconi.it) or through [B in Touch](https://bit.unibocconi.it/hc/en-us)
- Book a one-on-one meeting for more complex questions or specific needs

**Don’t forget:** Booking your study place is always mandatory, and silence must be respected in all Library areas.You can find the full [Rules for utilizing study seats](https://www.unibocconi.it/sites/default/files/media/attachments/Rules%20Seat%20management_ENG.pdf?VersionId=mX0FfjQymdPyiFxzchRov.1lWYCVKALh) in your [yoU@B Agenda](https://agenda.unibocconi.it/) — make sure to read and subscribe to them.

**Enjoy your start, and see you at the Library!**

[Home Library & Archives](https://www.unibocconi.it/en/current-students/library-archives)
